<file path="ArtifactsRepository/Claims/IBClaimsCommon/Groovy/IB_837_Audit_Error_Capture.txt">
import com.edifecs.etools.xeserver.proxy.ProxyMessage;
import com.edifecs.etools.commons.io.SmartStream;
import groovy.util.slurpersupport.NodeChild;
import java.io.*;
import groovy.util.XmlSlurper;
exchange = context.exchange;
exchProperties = exchange.properties;
messages = exchange.messages;
message = messages[0];
msgHeaders = message.headers;
// Fetch FileLevelErrorCheck and SE01Value properties
def FileLevelErrorCheck = exchProperties.get('FileLevelErrorCheck');
def SE01Value = exchProperties.get('SE01Value');  // Fetch the SE01Value property
if (exchProperties.get('auditEventNumber') in ["1", "3", "4", "7", "8"]) {
def auditEventNumber = exchProperties.get('auditEventNumber');
messageBodyInputStream = message.getBodyAsSmartStream().getInputStream();
def maxFormattedLength = 298;
// Parse XML
def root = new XmlSlurper().parse(messageBodyInputStream);
StringBuilder errorDetails = new StringBuilder();
def errors = root.'**'.findAll { it.name() == 'Error' };
// Iterate and format each error
errors.eachWithIndex { error, idx ->
def errorBrief = error.Brief?.text()?.trim();
def errorID = error.@ID?.toString();
def errorSnip = error.@SNIP?.toString();
// Nested info inside ErrorDataInfo
def errDataInfo = error.ErrorDataInfo;
def businessPath = errDataInfo.BusinessPath?.text()?.trim();
if (businessPath != "") {
businessPath = ": " + "ErrPath-" + "${businessPath}";
} else {
businessPath = "";
}
def errorSegment = errDataInfo.Part1?.text()?.trim();
if (errorSegment != "") {
errorSegment = ": " + "ErrSegment-" + "${errorSegment}";
} else {
errorSegment = "";
}
def errData = errDataInfo.ErrData?.text()?.trim();
if (errData != "") {
errData = ": " + "ErrData-" + "${errData}";
} else {
errData = "";
}
// Build base error string (excluding Msg and Description)
String formatted = "ErrID-${errorID}${errData}: SNIP-${errorSnip}${errorSegment}${businessPath}: ErrBrief-${errorBrief}";
// Truncate if longer than allowed
if (formatted.length() > maxFormattedLength) {
formatted = formatted.take(maxFormattedLength);
}
// Append with || separator if not first
if (idx > 0) {
errorDetails.append("||");
}
errorDetails.append(formatted);
}
// Add to headers
msgHeaders.put("ExtractedErrors", errorDetails.toString());
def AdaptorErrorMessage = '';
def newMessageBody = errorDetails.toString();
if (auditEventNumber == "3") {
if (newMessageBody != "") {
newMessageBody = errorDetails.toString();
}
}
if (FileLevelErrorCheck == "True") {
def fileLevelError = "ErrID-0x810005: ErrData-${SE01Value}: SNIP-1: ErrSegment-SE*: ErrPath-SE/96: ErrBrief-The values are not equal.";
if (newMessageBody?.trim()) {
newMessageBody = fileLevelError + "||" + newMessageBody;
} else {
newMessageBody = fileLevelError;
}
}
// Ensure the string length doesn't exceed 5000 characters
if (newMessageBody.length() > 5000) {
newMessageBody = newMessageBody.substring(0, 4992) + "(...)";
}
// Set property for downstream use
exchProperties['adaptorErrorMessage'] = newMessageBody;
}
// Evaluate the second script file if auditEventNumber is between 1 and 8
if ((exchProperties.get('auditEventNumber') >= "1") && (exchProperties.get('auditEventNumber') <= "8")) {
def AdaptorErrorMessage = exchProperties['adaptorErrorMessage'];
evaluate(new File("C:/Edifecs/Core/ArtifactsRepository/Claims/IBClaimsCommon/Groovy/P_IB_837_Audit.groovy.txt"));
}
</file>
<file path="ArtifactsRepository/Claims/IBClaimsCommon/Groovy/P_IB_837_API_Token_Reprocess.txt">
import com.edifecs.etools.xeserver.proxy.ProxyMessage
import java.text.SimpleDateFormat
import java.util.Calendar
import java.util.Date
// Assuming exchange, context, and message headers are already initialized
exchange = context.exchange
messages = exchange.messages
message = messages[0]
msgHeaders = message.headers
// Get the current date and time in the desired format yyyyMMddHHmm
def dateFormat = new SimpleDateFormat("yyyyMMddHHmm")
def currentDate = new Date()
def formattedCurrentDate = dateFormat.format(currentDate)
// Get the current time as a Calendar instance
def calendar = Calendar.getInstance()
calendar.setTime(currentDate)
// Subtract 1, 2, and 3 minutes
calendar.add(Calendar.MINUTE, -1)
def oneMinuteBefore = dateFormat.format(calendar.time)
calendar.add(Calendar.MINUTE, -1)  // Subtract another minute
def twoMinutesBefore = dateFormat.format(calendar.time)
calendar.add(Calendar.MINUTE, -1)  // Subtract another minute
def threeMinutesBefore = dateFormat.format(calendar.time)
// Create the msgHeaders with the calculated properties
def msgHeaders = [:]
msgHeaders['currentDateTime'] = formattedCurrentDate
msgHeaders['oneMinuteBefore'] = oneMinuteBefore
msgHeaders['twoMinutesBefore'] = twoMinutesBefore
msgHeaders['threeMinutesBefore'] = threeMinutesBefore
// If you don't have an actual message body, you can still send an empty message
def newMessageBody = ""  // No message body content in this case
// Create a new message (you can create an empty message if needed)
ProxyMessage newMessage = context.createNewMessage(newMessageBody, msgHeaders)
// Send the response with the new message and headers
context.createExchangeResponse(msgHeaders, newMessage)
</file>
<file path="ArtifactsRepository/Claims/IBClaimsCommon/Groovy/P_IB_837_Audit.groovy.txt">
import org.apache.commons.lang.StringUtils
import java.time.LocalDateTime
import java.time.Duration
import java.time.format.DateTimeFormatter
exchange = context.exchange
properties = exchange.properties
messages = exchange.messages
message = messages.first()
messageBodyInputStream = message.bodyAsSmartStream.inputStream
InputStreamReader isr = new InputStreamReader(messageBodyInputStream)
BufferedReader br = new BufferedReader(isr)
def auditEventNumber = properties.get('auditEventNumber')
def ValidationAuditStartDateTime = properties.get('ValidationAuditStartDateTime')
def ValidationAuditEndDateTime = properties.get('ValidationAuditEndDateTime')
def ConversionAuditStartDateTime = properties.get('ConversionAuditStartDateTime')
def ConversionAuditEndDateTime = properties.get('ConversionAuditEndDateTime')
if ((auditEventNumber == "1") || (auditEventNumber == "8"))
{
context.createExchangeResponse(properties, "")
}
if(auditEventNumber == "2" )
{
for (int i = 0;i<2;i++)
{
if(i == 0)
{
properties.put("AdaptorStatus","PROCESS_START")	;
properties.put("ProcessStageName","EDIFECS-Validation")	;
properties.put("AdaptorAuditDateTime",ValidationAuditStartDateTime);
context.createExchangeResponse(properties, messageBodyInputStream)
}
else
{
properties.put("AdaptorStatus","PROCESS_END");
properties.put("ProcessStageName","EDIFECS-Validation");
properties.put("AdaptorAuditDateTime",ValidationAuditEndDateTime);
context.createExchangeResponse(properties, messageBodyInputStream)
}
}
}
else if(auditEventNumber == "3")
{
for (int k = 0;k<2;k++)
{
if(k== 0)
{
properties.put("AdaptorStatus","PROCESS_START")	;
properties.put("ProcessStageName","EDIFECS-Validation")	;
properties.put("AdaptorErrorMessage","");
properties.put("AdaptorAuditDateTime",ValidationAuditStartDateTime);
context.createExchangeResponse(properties, messageBodyInputStream)
}
else
{
properties.put("AdaptorStatus","ERROR");
properties.put("ProcessStageName","EDIFECS-Validation");
properties.put("AdaptorErrorMessage","Edifecs HIPAA Validation Error");
properties.put("AdaptorAuditDateTime",ValidationAuditEndDateTime);
context.createExchangeResponse(properties, messageBodyInputStream)
}
}
}
else if(auditEventNumber == "4")
{
for (int l = 0;l<2;l++)
{
if(l== 0)
{
properties.put("AdaptorStatus","PROCESS_START")	;
properties.put("ProcessStageName","EDIFECS-Conversion")	;
properties.put("AdaptorErrorMessage","");
properties.put("AdaptorAuditDateTime",ConversionAuditStartDateTime);
context.createExchangeResponse(properties, messageBodyInputStream)
}
else
{
properties.put("AdaptorStatus","ERROR");
properties.put("ProcessStageName","EDIFECS-Conversion");
properties.put("AdaptorErrorMessage","Edifecs Translator Error");
properties.put("AdaptorAuditDateTime",ConversionAuditEndDateTime);
context.createExchangeResponse(properties, messageBodyInputStream)
}
}
}
else if(auditEventNumber == "5" )
{
for (int j = 0;j<3;j++)
{
if(j == 0)
{
properties.put("AdaptorStatus","PROCESS_START")	;
properties.put("ProcessStageName","EDIFECS-Conversion")	;
properties.put("AdaptorAuditDateTime",ConversionAuditStartDateTime);
context.createExchangeResponse(properties, messageBodyInputStream)
}
else if(j==1)
{
properties.put("AdaptorStatus","PROCESS_END");
properties.put("ProcessStageName","EDIFECS-Conversion");
properties.put("AdaptorAuditDateTime",ConversionAuditEndDateTime);
context.createExchangeResponse(properties, messageBodyInputStream)
}
else
{
// Convert ConversionAuditEndDateTime to LocalDateTime
LocalDateTime conversionEndDateTime = LocalDateTime.parse(ConversionAuditEndDateTime, DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSS"))
// Add 10 milliseconds
LocalDateTime publishedDateTime = conversionEndDateTime.plus(Duration.ofMillis(10))
String MesssagePublishedAuditDateTime = publishedDateTime.format(DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSS"))
properties.put("AdaptorStatus","MESSAGE_PUBLISHED");
properties.put("ProcessStageName","EDIFECS");
properties.put("AdaptorAuditDateTime",MesssagePublishedAuditDateTime);
context.createExchangeResponse(properties, messageBodyInputStream)
}
}
}
else if(auditEventNumber == "6" )
{
for (int j = 0;j<3;j++)
{
if(j == 0)
{
properties.put("AdaptorStatus","PROCESS_START")	;
properties.put("ProcessStageName","EDIFECS-Conversion")	;
properties.put("AdaptorAuditDateTime",ConversionAuditStartDateTime);
context.createExchangeResponse(properties, messageBodyInputStream)
}
else if(j==1)
{
properties.put("AdaptorStatus","PROCESS_END");
properties.put("ProcessStageName","EDIFECS-Conversion");
properties.put("AdaptorAuditDateTime",ConversionAuditEndDateTime);
context.createExchangeResponse(properties, messageBodyInputStream)
}
else
{
// Convert ConversionAuditEndDateTime to LocalDateTime
LocalDateTime conversionEndDateTime = LocalDateTime.parse(ConversionAuditEndDateTime, DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSS"))
// Add 10 milliseconds
LocalDateTime publishedDateTime = conversionEndDateTime.plus(Duration.ofMillis(10))
String MesssagePublishedAuditDateTime = publishedDateTime.format(DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSS"))
properties.put("AdaptorStatus","MESSAGE_PUBLISHED");
properties.put("ProcessStageName","EDIFECS");
properties.put("AdaptorAuditDateTime",MesssagePublishedAuditDateTime);
context.createExchangeResponse(properties, messageBodyInputStream)
}
}
}
else if(auditEventNumber == "7")
{
for (int l = 0;l<2;l++)
{
if(l== 0)
{
properties.put("AdaptorStatus","PROCESS_START")	;
properties.put("ProcessStageName","EDIFECS-Conversion")	;
properties.put("AdaptorErrorMessage","");
properties.put("AdaptorAuditDateTime",ConversionAuditStartDateTime);
context.createExchangeResponse(properties, messageBodyInputStream)
}
else
{
properties.put("AdaptorStatus","ERROR");
properties.put("ProcessStageName","EDIFECS-Conversion");
properties.put("AdaptorErrorMessage","Edifecs Translator Error");
properties.put("AdaptorAuditDateTime",ConversionAuditEndDateTime);
context.createExchangeResponse(properties, messageBodyInputStream)
}
}
}

<file path="ArtifactsRepository/Claims/IBClaimsCommon/Groovy/P_IB_837_AuditErrorCapture.groovy">
import com.edifecs.etools.xeserver.proxy.ProxyMessage
import com.edifecs.etools.commons.io.SmartStream
import groovy.util.slurpersupport.NodeChild
import java.io.*
import groovy.util.XmlSlurper
import org.apache.commons.lang.StringUtils
import java.time.LocalDateTime
import java.time.Duration
import java.time.format.DateTimeFormatter
exchange = context.exchange
exchProperties = exchange.properties
messages = exchange.messages
message = messages[0]
msgHeaders = message.headers
def FileLevelErrorCheck = exchProperties.get('FileLevelErrorCheck')
def SE01Value = exchProperties.get('SE01Value')
if (exchProperties.get('auditEventNumber') in ["1", "3", "4", "7", "8"]) {
def auditEventNumber = exchProperties.get('auditEventNumber')
def messageBodyInputStream = message.getBodyAsSmartStream().getInputStream()
def maxFormattedLength = 298
// Parse XML
def root = new XmlSlurper().parse(messageBodyInputStream)
StringBuilder errorDetails = new StringBuilder()
def errors = root.'**'.findAll { it.name() == 'Error' }
// Format each error
errors.eachWithIndex { error, idx ->
def errorBrief = error.Brief?.text()?.trim()
def errorID = error.@ID?.toString()
def errorSnip = error.@SNIP?.toString()
def errDataInfo = error.ErrorDataInfo
def businessPath = errDataInfo.BusinessPath?.text()?.trim()
def errorSegment = errDataInfo.Part1?.text()?.trim()
def errData = errDataInfo.ErrData?.text()?.trim()
businessPath = businessPath ? ": ErrPath-${businessPath}" : ""
errorSegment = errorSegment ? ": ErrSegment-${errorSegment}" : ""
errData = errData ? ": ErrData-${errData}" : ""
String formatted = "ErrID-${errorID}${errData}: SNIP-${errorSnip}${errorSegment}${businessPath}: ErrBrief-${errorBrief}"
if (formatted.length() > maxFormattedLength) {
formatted = formatted.take(maxFormattedLength)
}
if (idx > 0) {
errorDetails.append("||")
}
errorDetails.append(formatted)
}
msgHeaders.put("ExtractedErrors", errorDetails.toString())
def newMessageBody = errorDetails.toString()
if (auditEventNumber == "3" && newMessageBody != "") {
newMessageBody = errorDetails.toString()
}
if (FileLevelErrorCheck == "True") {
def fileLevelError = "ErrID-0x810005: ErrData-${SE01Value}: SNIP-1: ErrSegment-SE*: ErrPath-SE/96: ErrBrief-The values are not equal."
newMessageBody = newMessageBody?.trim() ? fileLevelError + "||" + newMessageBody : fileLevelError
}
if (newMessageBody.length() > 5000) {
newMessageBody = newMessageBody.substring(0, 4992) + "(...)"
}
exchProperties['adaptorErrorMessage'] = newMessageBody
}
def auditEventNumber = exchProperties.get('auditEventNumber')
def ValidationAuditStartDateTime = exchProperties.get('ValidationAuditStartDateTime')
def ValidationAuditEndDateTime = exchProperties.get('ValidationAuditEndDateTime')
def ConversionAuditStartDateTime = exchProperties.get('ConversionAuditStartDateTime')
def ConversionAuditEndDateTime = exchProperties.get('ConversionAuditEndDateTime')
def messageBodyInputStream = message.getBodyAsSmartStream().getInputStream()
if (auditEventNumber in ["1", "8"]) {
context.createExchangeResponse(exchProperties, "")
}
if (auditEventNumber == "2") {
(0..1).each { i ->
if (i == 0) {
exchProperties.put("AdaptorStatus", "PROCESS_START")
exchProperties.put("ProcessStageName", "EDIFECS-Validation")
exchProperties.put("AdaptorAuditDateTime", ValidationAuditStartDateTime)
} else {
exchProperties.put("AdaptorStatus", "PROCESS_END")
exchProperties.put("ProcessStageName", "EDIFECS-Validation")
exchProperties.put("AdaptorAuditDateTime", ValidationAuditEndDateTime)
}
context.createExchangeResponse(exchProperties, messageBodyInputStream)
}
} else if (auditEventNumber == "3") {
(0..1).each { k ->
if (k == 0) {
exchProperties.put("AdaptorStatus", "PROCESS_START")
exchProperties.put("ProcessStageName", "EDIFECS-Validation")
exchProperties.put("AdaptorErrorMessage", "")
exchProperties.put("AdaptorAuditDateTime", ValidationAuditStartDateTime)
} else {
exchProperties.put("AdaptorStatus", "ERROR")
exchProperties.put("ProcessStageName", "EDIFECS-Validation")
exchProperties.put("AdaptorErrorMessage", "Edifecs HIPAA Validation Error")
exchProperties.put("AdaptorAuditDateTime", ValidationAuditEndDateTime)
}
context.createExchangeResponse(exchProperties, messageBodyInputStream)
}
} else if (auditEventNumber == "4" || auditEventNumber == "7") {
(0..1).each { l ->
if (l == 0) {
exchProperties.put("AdaptorStatus", "PROCESS_START")
exchProperties.put("ProcessStageName", "EDIFECS-Conversion")
exchProperties.put("AdaptorErrorMessage", "")
exchProperties.put("AdaptorAuditDateTime", ConversionAuditStartDateTime)
} else {
exchProperties.put("AdaptorStatus", "ERROR")
exchProperties.put("ProcessStageName", "EDIFECS-Conversion")
exchProperties.put("AdaptorErrorMessage", "Edifecs Translator Error")
exchProperties.put("AdaptorAuditDateTime", ConversionAuditEndDateTime)
}
context.createExchangeResponse(exchProperties, messageBodyInputStream)
}
} else if (auditEventNumber in ["5", "6"]) {
(0..2).each { j ->
if (j == 0) {
exchProperties.put("AdaptorStatus", "PROCESS_START")
exchProperties.put("ProcessStageName", "EDIFECS-Conversion")
exchProperties.put("AdaptorAuditDateTime", ConversionAuditStartDateTime)
} else if (j == 1) {
exchProperties.put("AdaptorStatus", "PROCESS_END")
exchProperties.put("ProcessStageName", "EDIFECS-Conversion")
exchProperties.put("AdaptorAuditDateTime", ConversionAuditEndDateTime)
} else {
LocalDateTime end = LocalDateTime.parse(ConversionAuditEndDateTime, DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSS"))
LocalDateTime published = end.plus(Duration.ofMillis(10))
String msgPubTime = published.format(DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSS"))
exchProperties.put("AdaptorStatus", "MESSAGE_PUBLISHED")
exchProperties.put("ProcessStageName", "EDIFECS")
exchProperties.put("AdaptorAuditDateTime", msgPubTime)
}
context.createExchangeResponse(exchProperties, messageBodyInputStream)
}
}
</file>
<file path="ArtifactsRepository/Claims/IBClaimsCommon/Groovy/P_IB_837_ISA_Split.txt">
import org.apache.commons.lang.StringUtils
import com.edifecs.etools.xeserver.proxy.ProxyMessage
exchange = context.exchange;
exchProperties = exchange.properties;
messages = exchange.messages
message = messages[0]
msgHeaders = message.headers
// Copy exchange properties to message headers
exchProperties.each { k, v -> msgHeaders.put(k, v) }
// Retrieve the base filename and extension from input properties
def baseFileName = exchProperties.get('FileNameWithoutExt')  // Get the base filename without extension
def extension = exchProperties.get('extension')  // Get the file extension
// Read the input content as a String
messageBodyInputStream = message.getBodyAsSmartStream().getInputStream();
String inputContent = new String(messageBodyInputStream.readAllBytes());
// Replace all occurrences of ~ with \r\n (to format the unstructured file)
inputContent = inputContent.replace('~', '\r\n')
// Split the content into lines
def lines = inputContent.split('\n')
// Count the occurrences of CLM* segments
def clmCount = lines.count { it.startsWith("CLM*") }
// Set the clmCount in the properties as test
msgHeaders.put("TotalEdiTransaction", clmCount.toString())
// Find all the ISA* lines and split accordingly
def isaSegments = []
def currentISA = []
def isISAFound = false
// Process each line to identify ISA* and corresponding blocks
lines.each { line ->
if (line.startsWith("ISA*")) {
// If an ISA* is found, process the current block (if any)
if (isISAFound) {
isaSegments << currentISA.join('\n')  // Add the current block to the ISA segments list
}
currentISA = [line]  // Start a new block with the current ISA line
isISAFound = true
} else {
currentISA << line  // Add the line to the current block
}
}
// Add the last ISA* block
if (isISAFound) {
isaSegments << currentISA.join('\n')
}
// Check the number of ISA segments and decide whether to split the file or not
if (isaSegments.size() > 1) {
// If there are multiple ISA* segments, perform the split logic
isaSegments.eachWithIndex { segment, index ->
def finalFileName
if (isaSegments.size() > 1) {
// If there are multiple ISA* segments, append a counter
finalFileName = baseFileName + "_" + (index + 1) + "." + extension
} else {
// If there is only one ISA* segment, no counter is needed
finalFileName = baseFileName + "." + extension
}
// Set the final filename in the response properties
properties.put("SplitISAFileName", finalFileName)
msgHeaders.put("MultipleCheckISA", "Yes")
properties.put("SplitISAFileNameWithoutExt", baseFileName + "_" + (index + 1))
// Prepare headers for the new message
def newMsgHeaders = [:]  // Initialize a new map for the headers
exchProperties.each { k, v -> newMsgHeaders.put(k, v) }  // Populate the new message headers with existing exchange properties
// Create a new message using context.createNewMessage
ProxyMessage newMessage = context.createNewMessage(segment, newMsgHeaders)
// Set the SplitISAFileName header
newMessage.setHeader("SplitISAFileName", finalFileName)
// Send the response with the split content
context.createExchangeResponse(msgHeaders, newMessage)
}
} else {
// If there's only one ISA* segment, just send the original file as it is
def finalFileName = baseFileName + "." + extension
// Ensure the finalFileName is added to properties
properties.put("SplitISAFileNameWithoutExt", baseFileName)
msgHeaders.put("MultipleCheckISA", "No")
msgHeaders.put("SplitISAFileName", finalFileName)
// Send the original file without any modification
context.createExchangeResponse(msgHeaders, message)
}
</file>
<file path="ArtifactsRepository/Claims/IBClaimsCommon/Groovy/P_IB_837_Pulse_Report.groovy.txt">
// Importing the ProxyMessage class from the com.edifecs.etools.xeserver.proxy package
import com.edifecs.etools.xeserver.proxy.ProxyMessage;
// Importing the SmartStream class from the com.edifecs.etools.commons.io package
import com.edifecs.etools.commons.io.SmartStream;
// Importing the NodeChild class from the groovy.util.slurpersupport package
import groovy.util.slurpersupport.NodeChild;
// Importing all classes from the java.io package
import java.io.*;
exchange = context.exchange;
exchProperties = exchange.properties;
messages = exchange.messages;
message = messages[0];
msgHeaders = message.headers;
exchProperties.each // Iterate over each property in the 'exchProperties' object
{
k, v-> msgHeaders.put(k, v)  // Add the key-value pair to the 'msgHeaders' object
}
messageBodyInputStream = message.getBodyAsSmartStream().getInputStream(); // Get the body of the 'message' object as a SmartStream and retrieve its InputStream
def root = new XmlSlurper().parse(messageBodyInputStream); // Parse the InputStream using XmlSlurper and assign the resulting object to 'root'
def recordIdentifier = msgHeaders.get('recordidentifier')
def rayId = msgHeaders.get('rayidentifier')
def recordIdfromSource = msgHeaders.get('recordidfromsource')
StringBuilder errorBuilder = new StringBuilder();// Create a StringBuilder object
// Create a List
List snipListFile;
// Create a StringBuilder to store file-level errors
StringBuilder fileLevelErrors;
// Create a StringBuilder to store transaction-level errors
StringBuilder transactionErrors;
// Create a StringBuilder to store provider-level errors
StringBuilder providerErrors;
// Create a StringBuilder to store subscriber-level errors
StringBuilder subscriberErrors;
// Create a StringBuilder to store claim-level errors
StringBuilder claimErrors;
// Declare variables
def dataReportSnipCategory;
def dataReporCoverageSnip;
def dataReportErrorBrief;
def dataReportErrorMsg;
def dataReportErrorID;
def groupSnipCategory;
def groupCoverageSnip;
def groupErrorID;
def groupErrorBrief;
def groupErrorMsg;
def interchangeErrorBrief;
def interchangeErrorMsg;
def interchangeSnipCategory;
def interchangeCoverageSnip;
def interchangeErrorID = '';
def ediFileId = '';
def recordId = '';
def OriginalFileName = '';
def adaptorReceiptDateTime = '';
def ediFileType = '';
def InterchangeControlNumber = '';
def InterchangeSenderID = '';
def billingProviderNpi = '';
def billingProviderTaxId = '';
def billingProviderState = '';
def BHTdate = '';
def SubscriberNameFirst = '';
def SubscriberNameLast = '';
def SubscriberNameMiddle = '';
def SubscriberPrimaryID = '';
def dateOfBirth = '';
def SourceTypeIdentifier = '';
def SubmitterNameFirst = '';
def SubmitterNameLast = '';
def claimType = '';
def ClaimBilledAmount = '';
List snipList;
snipList = new ArrayList();
def countErrors(StringBuilder fileLevelErrors) {
// Convert the StringBuilder to a String
String errorString = fileLevelErrors.toString()
// Check if the string is empty
if (errorString.isEmpty()) {
// If empty, there are no errors
return 0
} else {
// Split the string by '~'
String[] errors = errorString.split("~")
// Count the errors
return errors.length
}
}
def errorCount;
root.each  // Iterate over each DataReportNode in the 'root' object
{
DataReportNode ->
int dataReportErrorcount = 0;
def EntireDocumentErrorTotal = '';
fileLevelErrorIDMap = new HashMap<String, String> ();
snipListFile = new ArrayList();
DataReportNode.Fields.Field.each  // Iterate over each Field within  DataReportNode
{
DataReportField ->
fileLevelErrors = new StringBuilder();
String entireDocumentField = DataReportField.@Name;
if (entireDocumentField == "OriginalFileName")
{
OriginalFileName = DataReportField.text();
}
if (entireDocumentField == "adaptorReceiptDateTime")
{
adaptorReceiptDateTime = DataReportField.text();
}
if (entireDocumentField == "claimType")
{
claimType = DataReportField.text();
}
if (entireDocumentField == "ediFileId")
{
ediFileId = DataReportField.text();
}
}
for (NodeChild error: DataReportNode.Errors.Error)  // Iterate over each 'Error' child node within 'DataReportNode.Errors'
{
dataReportErrorBrief = error.Brief.text().toString().replaceAll(',','');
dataReportErrorMsg = error.Msg.text().toString().replaceAll(',','');
dataReportSnipCategory = error.@Category;
dataReportErrorID = error.@ID;
if (dataReportSnipCategory == 'Rejecting')
{
dataReporCoverageSnip = error.@SNIP.text().toString();
if (!snipListFile.contains(dataReporCoverageSnip))
{
snipListFile.add(dataReporCoverageSnip);
}
dataReportErrorcount = dataReportErrorcount + 1;
String dataReportErrorcounter = Integer.toString(dataReportErrorcount);
if (!fileLevelErrors.isEmpty())
{
String temp = "~" + "${dataReportErrorID}" + ":" + "EntireDocumentError " + "${dataReportErrorcounter}" + " " + "${dataReportErrorBrief}" + "${dataReportErrorMsg}";
fileLevelErrors.append(temp);
}
else
{
String temp = "${dataReportErrorID}" + ":" + "EntireDocumentError " + "${dataReportErrorcounter}" + " " + "${dataReportErrorBrief}" + "${dataReportErrorMsg}";
fileLevelErrors.append(temp);
}
errorCount=countErrors(fileLevelErrors)
if(errorCount>=40)
{
break;
}
}
}
DataReportNode.ErrorStatistics.each
{
errorStatistics ->
EntireDocumentErrorTotal = errorStatistics.ErrorTotal.text().toString();
}
root.GroupNode.each // Iterate over each GroupNode in the 'root' object
{
InterchangeNode ->
int interchangeErrorcount = 0;
InterchangeNode.Fields.Field.each // Iterate over each Field within each InterchangeNode
{
InterchangeNodeField ->
String interchangeField = InterchangeNodeField.@Name;
if (interchangeField == "InterchangeSenderID")
{
InterchangeSenderID = InterchangeNodeField.text().trim();
}
if (interchangeField == "InterchangeControlNumber")
{
InterchangeControlNumber = InterchangeNodeField.text().trim();
}
}
for (NodeChild error: InterchangeNode.Errors.Error)   // Iterate over each 'Error' child node within 'InterchangeNode.Errors'
{
interchangeErrorBrief = error.Brief.text().toString().replaceAll(',','');
interchangeErrorMsg = error.Msg.text().toString().replaceAll(',','');
interchangeSnipCategory = error.@Category;
interchangeErrorID = error.@ID;
if (interchangeSnipCategory == 'Rejecting')
{
interchangeCoverageSnip = error.@SNIP.text().toString();
if (!snipListFile.contains(interchangeCoverageSnip))
{
snipListFile.add(interchangeCoverageSnip);
}
interchangeErrorcount = interchangeErrorcount + 1;
String interchangeErrorcounter = Integer.toString(interchangeErrorcount);
errorCount=countErrors(fileLevelErrors)
if (!fileLevelErrors.isEmpty() && errorCount < 40)
{
String temp = "~" + "${interchangeErrorID}" + ":" + "InterchangeGroupError " + "${interchangeErrorcounter}" + " " + "${interchangeErrorBrief}" + "${interchangeErrorMsg}";
fileLevelErrors.append(temp);
}
else
{
String temp = "${interchangeErrorID}" + ":" + "InterchangeGroupError " + "${interchangeErrorcounter}" + " " + "${interchangeErrorBrief}" + "${interchangeErrorMsg}";
fileLevelErrors.append(temp);
}
errorCount=countErrors(fileLevelErrors)
if(errorCount>=40)
{
break;
}
}
}
InterchangeNode.GroupNode.each   // Iterate over each node within each InterchangeNode
{
GroupNode ->
int groupErrorcount = 0;
for (NodeChild error: GroupNode.Errors.Error) // Iterate over each 'Error' child node within 'GroupNode.Errors'
{
groupErrorBrief = error.Brief.text().toString().replaceAll(',','');
groupErrorMsg = error.Msg.text().toString().replaceAll(',','');
groupSnipCategory = error.@Category;
groupErrorID = error.@ID;
if (groupSnipCategory == 'Rejecting')
{
groupCoverageSnip = error.@SNIP.text().toString();
if (!snipListFile.contains(groupCoverageSnip))
{
snipListFile.add(groupCoverageSnip);
}
groupErrorcount = groupErrorcount + 1;
String groupErrorcounter = Integer.toString(groupErrorcount);
errorCount=countErrors(fileLevelErrors)
if (!fileLevelErrors.isEmpty() && errorCount < 40)
{
String temp = "~" + "${groupErrorID}" + ":" + "FunctionalGroupError " + "${groupErrorcounter}" + " " + "${groupErrorBrief}" + "${groupErrorMsg}";
fileLevelErrors.append(temp);
}
else
{
String temp = "${groupErrorID}" + ":" + "FunctionalGroupError " + "${groupErrorcounter}" + " " + "${groupErrorBrief}" + "${groupErrorMsg}";
fileLevelErrors.append(temp);
}
errorCount=countErrors(fileLevelErrors)
if(errorCount>=40)
{
break;
}
}
}
// Generates CSV if the filelevel errors are grater than zero
if (fileLevelErrors?.size() > 0)
{  // Append values to errorBuilder
errorBuilder.append("Edifecs");
errorBuilder.append("|");
errorBuilder.append(OriginalFileName);
errorBuilder.append("|");
errorBuilder.append("Daily");
errorBuilder.append("|");
errorBuilder.append(InterchangeSenderID);
errorBuilder.append("|");
if (SourceTypeIdentifier.equals(SubmitterName + "_Paper"))
errorBuilder.append("P");
else if (SourceTypeIdentifier.equals(SubmitterName + "_Electronic"))
errorBuilder.append("E");
errorBuilder.append("|");
errorBuilder.append(ediFileId);
errorBuilder.append("|");
errorBuilder.append("|");
errorBuilder.append("|");
errorBuilder.append("|");
errorBuilder.append("|");
errorBuilder.append("|");
errorBuilder.append("|");
errorBuilder.append("|");
errorBuilder.append("|");
errorBuilder.append("|");
errorBuilder.append("|");
errorBuilder.append("|");
errorBuilder.append("|");
errorBuilder.append("|");
errorBuilder.append("|");
errorBuilder.append("|");
errorBuilder.append("|");
errorBuilder.append("|");
errorBuilder.append("|");
if (fileLevelErrorIDMap?.size() > 0)
{
errorBuilder.append("R").append('|');
}
else
{
errorBuilder.append("A").append('|');
}
fileLevelErrorIDMap.each { key, value ->
if (value.size() == 1) {
errorBuilder.append(value)
}
}
errorBuilder.append("|").append("|");
errorBuilder.append(fileLevelErrors.toString())
errorBuilder.append("|");
errorBuilder.append(EntireDocumentErrorTotal).append('|');
//Check for the SNIP erros and append 'Y' if present else append 'N'
if (snipListFile.contains("1"))
errorBuilder.append("N").append('|');
else
errorBuilder.append("Y").append('|');
if (snipListFile.contains("2"))
errorBuilder.append("N").append('|');
else
errorBuilder.append("Y").append('|');
if (snipListFile.contains("3"))
errorBuilder.append("N").append('|');
else
errorBuilder.append("Y").append('|');
if (snipListFile.contains("4"))
errorBuilder.append("N").append('|');
else
errorBuilder.append("Y").append('|');
if (snipListFile.contains("5"))
errorBuilder.append("N").append('|');
else
errorBuilder.append("Y").append('|');
if (snipListFile.contains("6"))
errorBuilder.append("N").append('|');
else
errorBuilder.append("Y").append('|');
if (snipListFile.contains("7"))
errorBuilder.append("N").append('|');
else
{
errorBuilder.append("Y").append('|');
}
errorBuilder.append('|');
errorBuilder.append('|');
errorBuilder.append('|');
errorBuilder.append('|');
errorBuilder.append('|');
errorBuilder.append(adaptorReceiptDateTime);
errorBuilder.append("\r\n");
// Convert the contents of 'errorBuilder' to a string
newMessageBody = errorBuilder.toString();
// Create a new message using 'newMessageBody' and the headers from the original message
ProxyMessage newMessage = context.createNewMessage(newMessageBody, message.getHeaders());
// Create an exchange response with 'msgHeaders' and 'newMessage'
context.createExchangeResponse(msgHeaders, newMessage);
}
//If filelevel errors are not present the control moves to the transaction node
else
{
GroupNode.GroupNode.each   // Iterate over each Transaction node within each GroupNode
{
TransactionNode ->
TransactionNode.Fields.Field.each // Iterate over each Field within each TransactionNode
{
TransactionNodeField ->
String transactionField = TransactionNodeField.@Name;
if (transactionField == "BHTdate")
{
BHTdate = TransactionNodeField.text().trim();
}
if (transactionField == "SourceTypeIdentifier")
{
SourceTypeIdentifier = TransactionNodeField.text().trim();
}
if (transactionField == "SubmitterNameFirst")
{
SubmitterNameFirst = TransactionNodeField.text().trim().replaceAll(',','');
}
if (transactionField == "SubmitterNameLast")
{
SubmitterNameLast = TransactionNodeField.text().trim().replaceAll(',','');
}
}
if (SubmitterNameFirst=="")
{
SubmitterName=SubmitterNameLast;
}
else if(SubmitterNameLast=="")
{
SubmitterName=SubmitterNameFirst;
}
else
{
SubmitterName=SubmitterNameLast+" "+SubmitterNameFirst;
}
transactionErrors = new StringBuilder();
//List snipList;
transSnipList = new ArrayList();
transactionErrorIDMap = new HashMap<String, String> ();
int transactionErrorcount = 0;
int TransactionErrorTotal = 0;
def transactionSnipCategory = '';
def transactionSnip = '';
def transactionErrorID = '';
def transactionErrorBrief = '';
def transactionErrorMsg = '';
//def ecRuleValue = TransactionNode.@ecRule.text();
//def StatusCode = TransactionNode.@StatusCode.text();
for (NodeChild error: TransactionNode.Errors.Error) // Iterate over each 'Error' child node within 'TransactionNode.Errors'
{
transactionErrorBrief = error.Brief.text().toString().replaceAll(',','');
transactionErrorMsg = error.Msg.text().toString().replaceAll(',','');
transactionErrorID = error.@ID;
transactionSnipCategory = error.@Category;
if (transactionSnipCategory == 'Rejecting')
{
transactionSnip = error.@SNIP.text().toString();
if (!transSnipList.contains(transactionSnip))
{
transSnipList.add(transactionSnip);
}
TransactionNode.ErrorStatistics.each
{
errorStatistics ->
TransactionErrorTotal = errorStatistics.ErrorCount.text().toInteger();
}
transactionErrorcount = transactionErrorcount + 1;
String transactionErrorcounter = Integer.toString(transactionErrorcount);
errorCount=countErrors(fileLevelErrors)
if (!fileLevelErrors.isEmpty() && errorCount < 40)
{
String temp = "~" + "${transactionErrorID}" + ":" + "TransactionSetError " + "${transactionErrorcounter}" + " " + "${transactionErrorBrief}" + "${transactionErrorMsg}";
fileLevelErrors.append(temp);
}
else
{
String temp = "${transactionErrorID}" + ":" + "TransactionSetError " + "${transactionErrorcounter}" + " " + "${transactionErrorBrief}" + "${transactionErrorMsg}";
fileLevelErrors.append(temp);
}
errorCount=countErrors(fileLevelErrors)
if(errorCount>=40)
{
break;
}
}
}
String recordLevelErrorCountTotal = '';
TransactionNode.GroupNode.each // Iterate over each ProviderNode within each TransactionNode
{
ProviderNode ->
ProviderNode.Fields.Field.each  // Iterate over each Field within each ProviderNode
{
ProviderNodeField ->
String providerField = ProviderNodeField.@Name;
if (providerField == "billingProviderNpi")
{
billingProviderNpi = ProviderNodeField.text().trim();
}

billingProviderState = ProviderNodeField.text().trim();

if (!fileLevelErrors.isEmpty() && errorCount < 40)

ProviderNode.GroupNode.each // Iterate over each SubscriberNode within each ProviderNode
{
SubscriberNode ->

{
SubscriberNodeField ->

subscriberErrors = new StringBuilder();
subscriberErrorIDMap = new HashMap<String, String> ();
subscriberSnipList = new ArrayList();

def subscriberErrorBrief = '';
def subscriberErrorMsg = '';

subscriberSnipCategory = error.@Category;

{
errorStatistics ->

errorCount=countErrors(fileLevelErrors)
if (!fileLevelErrors.isEmpty() && errorCount < 40)
{

}
else
{

errorCount=countErrors(fileLevelErrors)

{

}
SubscriberNode.GroupNode.each		// Iterate over each PatientNode within each SubscriberNode
{
PatientNode ->
def PatientNameFirst = '';
def PatientNameLast = '';
def PatientNameMiddle = '';
def PatientControlNumber = '';
def PatientBirthDate = '';
// Create a StringBuilder to store patient-level errors
StringBuilder patientErrors = new StringBuilder();
patientErrorIDMap = new HashMap<String, String> ();  // Create a new HashMap to store patient error IDs
int patientErrorcount = 0;
int patientErrorTotal = 0;
def patientSnipCategory = '';
def patientSnip = '';
def patientErrorID = '';
def patientErrorBrief = '';
def patientErrorMsg = '';
patientSnipList = new ArrayList();
String GroupName = PatientNode.@Name;
if (GroupName == "Patient") // Replaces SubscriberNode as PatientNode
{
SubscriberNode = PatientNode;
PatientNode.Fields.Field.each   // Iterate over each Field within each PatientNode
{
PatientNodeField ->
String patientField = PatientNodeField.@Name;
if (patientField == "PatientNameFirst")
{
PatientNameFirst = PatientNodeField.text().trim().replaceAll(',','');
}
if (patientField == "PatientNameLast")
{
PatientNameLast = PatientNodeField.text().trim().replaceAll(',','');
}
if (patientField == "PatientNameMiddle")
{
PatientNameMiddle = PatientNodeField.text().trim().replaceAll(',','');
}
if (patientField == "PatientBirthDate")
{
PatientBirthDate = PatientNodeField.text().trim();
}
}
patientSnipList.clear();
patientErrorMsg='';;
patientErrorID='';
patientSnipCategory='';
for (NodeChild error: PatientNode.Errors.Error) // Iterate over each 'Error' child node within 'PatientNode.Errors'
{
patientErrorBrief = error.Brief.text().toString().replaceAll(',','');
patientErrorMsg = error.Msg.text().toString().replaceAll(',','');
patientErrorID = error.@ID;
patientSnipCategory = error.@Category;
if (patientSnipCategory == 'Rejecting')
{
patientSnip = error.@SNIP.text().toString();
if (!patientSnipList.contains(patientSnip))
{
patientSnipList.add(patientSnip);
}
PatientNode.ErrorStatistics.each
{
errorStatistics ->
patientErrorTotal = errorStatistics.ErrorCount.toInteger()
}
patientErrorcount = patientErrorcount + 1;
String patientErrorcounter = Integer.toString(patientErrorcount);
errorCount=countErrors(fileLevelErrors)
if (!fileLevelErrors.isEmpty() && errorCount < 40)
{
String temp = "~" + "${patientErrorID}" + ":" + "PatientSetError " + "${patientErrorcounter}" + " " + "${patientErrorBrief}" + "${patientErrorMsg}";
fileLevelErrors.append(temp);
}
else
{
String temp = "${patientErrorID}" + ":" + "PatientSetError " + "${patientErrorcounter}" + " " + "${patientErrorBrief}" + "${patientErrorMsg}";
fileLevelErrors.append(temp);
}
errorCount=countErrors(fileLevelErrors)
if(errorCount>=40)
{
break;
}
}
}
}
def ClearinghouseNumber = '';
def DCN = '';
SubscriberNode.GroupNode.each
{
ClaimNode ->						// Iterate over each ClaimNode within each SubscriberNode if PatientNode is absent else iterate over each PatientNode
ClaimNode.Fields.Field.each // Iterate over each Field within each ClaimNode
{
ClaimNodeField ->
String claimField = ClaimNodeField.@Name;
if (claimField == "claimType")
{
claimType = ClaimNodeField.text().trim();
}
if (claimField == "ClaimBilledAmount")
{
ClaimBilledAmount = ClaimNodeField.text().trim();
}
if (claimField == "PatientControlNumber")
{
PatientControlNumber = ClaimNodeField.text().trim().replaceAll(',','');
}
if (claimField == "ClearinghouseNumber")
{
ClearinghouseNumber =ClaimNodeField.text().trim();
}
if (claimField == "DCN")
{
DCN = ClaimNodeField.text().trim();
}
}
claimErrors = new StringBuilder();
claimErrorIDMap = new HashMap<String, String> ();
claimSnipList = new ArrayList();
int claimErrorcount = 0;
int claimErrorTotal = 0;
def claimSnipCategory = '';
def claimSnip = '';
def claimErrorID = '';
def claimErrorBrief = '';
def claimErrorMsg = '';
def ecRuleValue = ClaimNode.@ecRule.text();
def StatusCode = ClaimNode.@StatusCode.text();
for (NodeChild error: ClaimNode.Errors.Error)  // Iterate over each 'Error' child node within 'ClaimNode.Errors'
{
claimErrorBrief = error.Brief.text().toString().replaceAll(',','');
claimErrorMsg = error.Msg.text().toString().replaceAll(',','');
claimErrorID = error.@ID;
claimSnipCategory = error.@Category;
if (claimSnipCategory == 'Rejecting')
{
claimSnip = error.@SNIP.text().toString();
if (!claimSnipList.contains(claimSnip))
{
claimSnipList.add(claimSnip);
}
ClaimNode.ErrorStatistics.each
{
errorStatistics ->
claimErrorTotal = errorStatistics.ErrorCount.toInteger()
}
claimErrorcount = claimErrorcount + 1;
String claimErrorcounter = Integer.toString(claimErrorcount);
errorCount=countErrors(fileLevelErrors)
if (!fileLevelErrors.isEmpty() && errorCount < 40)
{
String temp = "~" + "${claimErrorID}" + ":" + "ClaimSetError " + "${claimErrorcounter}" + " " + "${claimErrorBrief}" + "${claimErrorMsg}";
fileLevelErrors.append(temp);
}
else
{
String temp = "${claimErrorID}" + ":" + "ClaimSetError " + "${claimErrorcounter}" + " " + "${claimErrorBrief}" + "${claimErrorMsg}";
fileLevelErrors.append(temp);
}
errorCount=countErrors(fileLevelErrors)
if(errorCount>=40)
{
break;
}
}
}
// CSV generation starts from here, by appendindg the values to errorBuilder
errorBuilder.append("Edifecs");
errorBuilder.append("|");
errorBuilder.append(OriginalFileName);
errorBuilder.append("|");
errorBuilder.append("Daily");
errorBuilder.append("|");
errorBuilder.append(InterchangeSenderID);
errorBuilder.append("|");
if (SourceTypeIdentifier.equals(SubmitterName + "_Paper"))
errorBuilder.append("P");
else if (SourceTypeIdentifier.equals(SubmitterName + "_Electronic"))
errorBuilder.append("E");
errorBuilder.append("|");
errorBuilder.append(ediFileId);
errorBuilder.append("|");
errorBuilder.append(recordIdfromSource);
errorBuilder.append("|");
errorBuilder.append(ClearinghouseNumber);
errorBuilder.append("|");
errorBuilder.append(DCN);
errorBuilder.append("|");
errorBuilder.append(claimType);
errorBuilder.append("|");
errorBuilder.append(PatientControlNumber);
errorBuilder.append("|");
errorBuilder.append(PatientNameFirst);
errorBuilder.append("|");
errorBuilder.append(PatientNameMiddle);
errorBuilder.append("|");
errorBuilder.append(PatientNameLast);
errorBuilder.append("|");
if (PatientBirthDate != '')
{
errorBuilder.append(PatientBirthDate.substring(0, 4) + "-" + PatientBirthDate.substring(4, 6) + "-" + PatientBirthDate.substring(6, 8));
}
errorBuilder.append("|");
errorBuilder.append(SubscriberPrimaryID);
errorBuilder.append("|");
errorBuilder.append(SubscriberNameFirst);
errorBuilder.append("|");
errorBuilder.append(SubscriberNameMiddle);
errorBuilder.append("|");
errorBuilder.append(SubscriberNameLast);
errorBuilder.append("|");
errorBuilder.append(dateOfBirth);
errorBuilder.append("|");
errorBuilder.append(ClaimBilledAmount);
errorBuilder.append("|");
errorBuilder.append(billingProviderNpi);
errorBuilder.append("|");
errorBuilder.append(billingProviderTaxId);
errorBuilder.append("|");
errorBuilder.append(billingProviderState);
errorBuilder.append("|");
if(StatusCode == 'R')
{
errorBuilder.append("R").append('|');
}
else
{
errorBuilder.append("A").append('|');
}
errorBuilder.append('|');
//errorBuilder.append(",");
// Convert the StringBuilder to a String
String errorString = fileLevelErrors.toString()
String[] errors = errorString.split("~")
errors = errors.collect
{ error ->
if (error.length() > 150)
{
errors= error.substring(0, 142) + "(...)";
}
else
{
errors = error;
}
}
errorString = errors.join('~')
// Return the result
// return result
// }
//fileLevelErrors = errorLengthCheck(fileLevelErrors)
//errorBuilder.append(',');
if(errorCount <40 && errorCount!=0)
{
//println("<40if");
errorBuilder.append(errorString);
//println('errorsappend'+errorCount);
}
else if(errorCount == 40)
{
//println('errorsappend2'+errorCount);
//println("=40if");
errorBuilder.append(errorString).append("(...)");
}
errorBuilder.append("|").append("|");
int recordLevelErrorCountInteger = 0;
recordLevelErrorCountInteger = TransactionErrorTotal + providerErrorTotal + subscriberErrorTotal + patientErrorTotal + claimErrorTotal;
recordLevelErrorCountTotal = Integer.toString(recordLevelErrorCountInteger);
errorBuilder.append(recordLevelErrorCountTotal).append('|');
snipList=transSnipList + providerSnipList + subscriberSnipList + patientSnipList + claimSnipList;
//Check for the SNIP erros and append 'Y' if present else append 'N'
if (snipList.contains("1"))
{
errorBuilder.append("N").append('|');
}
else
{
errorBuilder.append("Y").append('|');
}
if (snipList.contains("2"))
{
errorBuilder.append("N").append('|');
}
else
{
errorBuilder.append("Y").append('|');
}
if (snipList.contains("3"))
{
errorBuilder.append("N").append('|');
}
else
{
errorBuilder.append("Y").append('|');
}
if (snipList.contains("4"))
{
errorBuilder.append("N").append('|');
}
else
{
errorBuilder.append("Y").append('|');
}
if (snipList.contains("5"))
{
errorBuilder.append("N").append('|');
}
else
{
errorBuilder.append("Y").append('|');
}
if (snipList.contains("6"))
{
errorBuilder.append("N").append('|');
}
else
{
errorBuilder.append("Y").append('|');
}
if (snipList.contains("7"))
{
errorBuilder.append("N").append('|');
}
else
{
errorBuilder.append("Y").append('|');
}
errorBuilder.append('|');
errorBuilder.append('|');
errorBuilder.append(rayId);
errorBuilder.append('|');
errorBuilder.append(recordIdentifier);
errorBuilder.append('|');
if(BHTdate != ''){
errorBuilder.append(BHTdate.substring(0,4)+"-"+BHTdate.substring(4,6)+"-"+BHTdate.substring(6,8));
}
errorBuilder.append('|');
errorBuilder.append(adaptorReceiptDateTime);
errorBuilder.append("\r\n");
fileLevelErrors.setLength(0)
}
}
}
}
}
newMessageBody = errorBuilder.toString(); // Convert the contents of 'errorBuilder' to a string
ProxyMessage newMessage = context.createNewMessage(newMessageBody, message.getHeaders()) // Create a new message using 'newMessageBody' and the headers from the original message
context.createExchangeResponse(msgHeaders, newMessage); // Create an exchange response with 'msgHeaders' and 'newMessage'
}
}
}
}
</file>

}#if ($MessageReadFlag == "No"),#{else}#end

#{else}#end

#{else}#end

"recordIdentifierFromSource": "${RecordIdFromSourceAudit}"
#{else}#end
#if($RecordIdFromSource != "" and $RecordIdFromSource!= "(N/A)" and $RecordIdFromSource != "{Prp[RecordIdFromSource]}" and $RecordIdFromSource != "null" and $FileLevelFlag!="Yes" and $MessageReadFlag == "No" and $DuplicateEdi == "Yes")
"recordIdentifierFromSource": "${RecordIdFromSource}"
#{else}#end
}
#{else}#end
#if ($FileErrorFlag == "No" or  $DupFlag=="Yes" or $FieldFlag=="Yes" and $InterchangeError!="Yes"),
#{else}#end
#if ($MessageReadFlag == "No" and  $FileErrorFlag=="No" or $DupFlag=="Yes" or $FieldFlag=="Yes" and $InterchangeError!="Yes")
"claim": {
#if($ClaimTransactionType != "" and $ClaimTransactionType != "(N/A)" and $ClaimTransactionType != "{Prp[ClaimTransactionType]}" and $ClaimTransactionType != "null" and $MessageReadFlag == "No")
"claimTransactionType": "${ClaimTransactionType}",
#{else}#end

#{else}#end

#{else}#end

"patientControlNumber": "${PatientControlNumberAudit}",
#{else}#end
#if($PatientName!= "" and $PatientName != "(N/A)" and $PatientName != "{Prp[PatientName]}" and $PatientName != "null")
"patientName": "${PatientName}",
#{else}#end
#if(($PatientName == "" or $PatientName == "(N/A)" or $PatientName == "null") and ($memberName != "" and $memberName!= "(N/A)" and $memberName != "{Prp[memberName]}" and $memberName != "null"))
"patientName": "${memberName}",
#{else}#end
#if($patientDOB != "" and $patientDOB!= "(N/A)" and $patientDOB != "{Prp[patientDOB]}" and $patientDOB != "null")
"patientDOB": "${patientDOB}",

Pth="{P1}{S1004}{1}{S3108}/element(name = 'rayId')"/><CP ID="14898" Pth="{P1}{S1004}{2}{S3108}/element(name = 'rayId')"/><CP ID="14904" Pth="{P1}{S1004}{1}{S3108}/element(name = 'tenantIdentifier')"/><CP ID="14908" Pth="{P1}{S1004}{2}{S3108}/element(name = 'tenantIdentifier')"/><CP ID="14912" Pth="{P2}{S3321}"/><CP ID="14918" Pth="{S3139}"/><CP ID="14921" Pth="{P8}{S1019}{S3277}"/><CP ID="14923" Pth="{P1}{S1004}{1}{S1000}{S3030}/element(name = 'practitionerIdQualifier')"/><CP ID="14925" Pth="{P1}{S1004}{1}{S1000}{S3030}/element(name = 'practitionerNpi')"/></CPs><ReverseConnectionPoints><CP ID="14683" O="14682"/><CP ID="14685" O="14684"/></ReverseConnectionPoints/></Targets><Fs><F ID="374" T="ChangeVariable"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Stores the value of ISA06.
</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="variableID">26</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="3242" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="378" N="Set Value_2000B" T="SetValue"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Passes the interchange control number when activated.</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="3252" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="3253" FP="A" N="v" DirectValue="{60}"/><CP ID="3251" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="381" N="Set Value_PatientClaim" T="SetValue"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Set the value of the varibale uniqueId on activation.</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="3261" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="3262" FP="A" N="v" DirectValue="{60}"/><CP ID="3260" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="384" T="ChangeVariable"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Stores the value of ST02.
</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="variableID">28</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="3270" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="395" T="ChangeVariable"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Stores the value of BHT04.
</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="variableID">30</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="3298" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="397" T="ChangeVariable"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Stores the value of BHT03.
</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="variableID">29</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="3300" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="405" N="Change Variable" T="ChangeVariable"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Stores the value of NM103.
</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="variableID">31</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="3323" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="407" T="ChangeVariable"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Stores the value of NM109.
</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="variableID">32</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="3327" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="417" N="JavaScript_2010AA_BillingProviderInfoInput" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Get the input from 2010AA loop and creates a recordset. </P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">/*Record Set &quot;BillingProvider&quot; has next information:
00-2010AA.NM103 (Last Name)
01-2010AA.NM109 (Billing Provider Identifier)
02-2010AA.N301  (Address Line#1)
03-2010AA.N401  (City Name)
04-2010AA.N402  (State Code)
05-2010AA.N403  (Postal Zone or ZIP Code)
06-2010AA.N404  (Country Code)
07-2010AA.REF02 (Reference Identification)
08-2010AA.N403(byte 1-5) (zip Code)
09-2010AA.N403(byte 6-9) (zip Suffix Code)
10-2010AA.PER04/06/08 (Telephone Number)
11-2010AA.PER04/06/08 (Fax Number) */
//Assigns recordset values into array &quot;myRS&quot;
myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;BillingProvider&quot;);
var resArr = new Array();
//Assigns the input values to the respective indices of the array &quot;resArr&quot;
for (var i = 0; i &lt; 16; i++)
{
resArr[i] = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i);
}
//Assign values of the the array &quot;resArr&quot; to the recordset array myRS
myRS.insertRow();
myRS.updateRow(resArr);
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;BillingProvider&quot;, myRS, true);</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="3352" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="3353" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="3357" FP="A" P="2" N="value6"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="3358" FP="A" P="3" N="value7"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="3359" FP="A" P="4" N="value8"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="3360" FP="A" P="5" N="value9"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="3361" FP="A" P="6" N="value10"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="3362" FP="A" P="7" N="value11"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="3363" FP="A" P="8" N="value12"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="3364" FP="A" P="9" N="value13"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="3365" FP="A" P="10" N="value14"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="3366" FP="A" P="11" N="value15"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="3367" FP="A" P="12" N="value16"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="3419" FP="A" P="13" N="value17"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="14827" FP="A" P="14" N="value3"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="14828" FP="A" P="15" N="value4"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="3351" FP="X" P="0" N="no output"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="418" N="JavaScript_2010AA_BillingProviderInfoOutput" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Triggers the recordset based on the activation and maps the value to the target guideline.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">/*Record Set &quot;BillingProvider&quot; has next information:
00-2010AA.NM103           -  Last Name
01-2010AA.NM109           -  Billing Provider Identifier
02-2010AA.N301            -  Address Line#1
03-2010AA.N401            -  City Name
04-2010AA.N402            -  State Code
05-2010AA.N403            -  Postal Zone or ZIP Code
06-2010AA.N404            -  Country Code
07-2010AA.REF02           -  Reference Identification
08-2010AA.N403(byte 1-5)  -  zip Code
09-2010AA.N403(byte 6-9)  -  zip Suffix Code
10-2010AA.PER04/06/08     -  Telephone Number
11-2010AA.PER04/06/08     -  Fax Number */
//Gets recordset values to the &quot;myRS&quot; array
myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;BillingProvider&quot;);
myRS.last();
var telephone = &quot;&quot;;
var faxnumber = &quot;&quot;;
var RS = myRS.getRow();
//Assigns the recorset array values to the array &quot;Fields&quot;
while(RS&gt;0)
{
Fields = myRS.getFields();
//Checks for Telephone Number
if (Fields[10] == &quot;TE&quot;)
{
if(telephone == &quot;&quot;)
{
telephone =Fields[11];
Fields[16] = telephone;
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(10, Fields[16].trim());
}
}
else if (Fields[12] == &quot;TE&quot;)
{
if(telephone == &quot;&quot;)
{
telephone =Fields[13]
Fields[16] = telephone;
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(10, Fields[16].trim());
}
}
else if (Fields[14] == &quot;TE&quot;)
{
if(telephone == &quot;&quot;)
{
telephone =Fields[15];
Fields[16] = telephone;
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(10, Fields[16].trim());
}
}
//Checks for Fax Number
if (Fields[10] == &quot;FX&quot;)
{
if(faxnumber == &quot;&quot;)
{
faxnumber= Fields[11]
Fields[17] = faxnumber;
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(11, Fields[17].trim());
}
}
else if (Fields[12] == &quot;FX&quot;)
{
if(faxnumber == &quot;&quot;)
{
faxnumber = Fields[13];
Fields[17] = faxnumber;
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(11, Fields[17].trim());
}
}
else if (Fields[14] == &quot;FX&quot;)
{
if(faxnumber == &quot;&quot;)
{
faxnumber = Fields[15];
Fields[17] = faxnumber;
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(11, Fields[17].trim());
}
}
//Report the output values to the respective indexes
for (var i = 0; i &lt; 10; i++)
{
if(Fields[i]!=undefined &amp;&amp; Fields[i] != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(i, Fields[i].trim());
}
}
myRS.previous();
RS = myRS.getRow();
}
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="3384" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="3385" FP="A" P="0" N="no input"/><CP ID="3368" FP="X" P="0" N="NM103"/><CP ID="3369" FP="X" P="1" N="NM109"/><CP ID="3373" FP="X" P="2" N="N301"/><CP ID="3374" FP="X" P="3" N="N302"/><CP ID="3375" FP="X" P="4" N="N401"/><CP ID="3376" FP="X" P="5" N="N402"/><CP ID="3377" FP="X" P="6" N="N403"/><CP ID="3378" FP="X" P="7" N="N404"/><CP ID="3379" FP="X" P="8" N="REF01"/><CP ID="3380" FP="X" P="9" N="REF02"/><CP ID="3381" FP="X" P="10" N="PER04_PER06_telephoneNumber"/><CP ID="3382" FP="X" P="11" N="PER04_PER06_faxNumber"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="420" N="Substring_2010AA_ZipCode" T="Substring"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Take the first 5 bytes of the input.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="start">0</P><P N="length">5</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="3392" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="3391" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="421" N="Substring_2010AA_ZipCodeSuffix" T="Substring"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Take the last 4  bytes of the input
</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="start">5</P><P N="length">4</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="3394" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="3393" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="422" N="ConditionalCopy_2010AA_CountryCode" T="ConditionalCopy"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">‘CountryCode’ tag can is loaded as ‘US’ by default when there is no corresponding value in the N4 segments in EDI.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/arg1">3396</P><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/arg1/type">2</P><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/operation">0</P><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/operation/type">0</P><P N="if_1/actions/assignment_1/lvalue">3395</P><P N="if_1/actions/assignment_1/lvalue/type">2</P><P N="if_1/actions/assignment_1/rvalue">US</P><P N="else/actions/assignment_1/lvalue">3395</P><P N="else/actions/assignment_1/lvalue/type">2</P><P N="else/actions/assignment_1/rvalue">3396</P><P N="else/actions/assignment_1/rvalue/type">2</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="3396" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="3395" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="425" N="JavaScript_2010AA_TaxIdentificationNumber" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">if /837/2000A/2010AA/REF01 (Reference Identification Qualifieris ‘SY’ then it will be mapped into ‘XXX-XX-XXXX’ format to taxIdentificationNumber (institutionalClaim/supplierInformation/taxIdentificationNumber
</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var refIDQua = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(0);
var refIDNum = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(1);
if(refIDQua==&quot;EI&quot;)
{
var r1 = refIDNum.substring(0,2);
var r2 = refIDNum.substring(2);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,r1+&quot;-&quot;+r2);//Changes to xx-xxxxxxx format
}</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="3402" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="3403" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="3401" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="430" N="JavaScript_2010AA_N301_And_N302" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Concatenates the address2 value with address1 separated by a comma,if address2 is present else returns the address1 value.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var address1 = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(0);
var address2 = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(1);
if(address2!=&quot;&quot;)
value=address1.trim()+&quot;, &quot;+address2.trim();
else if(address2==&quot;&quot;)
value=address1;
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,value);
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="3423" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="3424" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="3422" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="463" N="JavaScript_2010AA_BillingProviderInfoOutput" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Get the input values and forms recordset.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">/*Record Set &quot;BillingProvider&quot; has next information:
00-2010AA.NM103           -  Last Name
01-2010AA.NM109           -  Billing Provider Identifier
02-2010AA.N301            -  Address Line#1
03-2010AA.N401            -  City Name
04-2010AA.N402            -  State Code
05-2010AA.N403            -  Postal Zone or ZIP Code
06-2010AA.N404            -  Country Code
07-2010AA.REF02           -  Reference Identification
08-2010AA.N403(byte 1-5)  -  zip Code
09-2010AA.N403(byte 6-9)  -  zip Suffix Code
10-2010AA.PER04/06/08     -  Telephone Number
11-2010AA.PER04/06/08     -  Fax Number */
//Gets recordset values to the &quot;myRS&quot; array
myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;BillingProvider&quot;);
myRS.last();
var telephone = &quot;&quot;;
var faxnumber = &quot;&quot;;
var RS = myRS.getRow();
//Assigns the recorset array values to the array &quot;Fields&quot;
while(RS&gt;0)
{
Fields = myRS.getFields();
//Checks for Telephone Number
if (Fields[10] == &quot;TE&quot;)
{
if(telephone == &quot;&quot;)
{
telephone =Fields[11];
Fields[16] = telephone;
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(10, Fields[16].trim());
}
}
else if (Fields[12] == &quot;TE&quot;)
{
if(telephone == &quot;&quot;)
{
telephone =Fields[13]
Fields[16] = telephone;
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(10, Fields[16].trim());
}
}
else if (Fields[14] == &quot;TE&quot;)
{
if(telephone == &quot;&quot;)
{
telephone =Fields[15];
Fields[16] = telephone;
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(10, Fields[16].trim());
}
}
//Checks for Fax Number
if (Fields[10] == &quot;FX&quot;)
{
if(faxnumber == &quot;&quot;)
{
faxnumber= Fields[11]
Fields[17] = faxnumber;
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(11, Fields[17].trim());
}
}
else if (Fields[12] == &quot;FX&quot;)
{
if(faxnumber == &quot;&quot;)
{
faxnumber = Fields[13];
Fields[17] = faxnumber;
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(11, Fields[17].trim());
}
}
else if (Fields[14] == &quot;FX&quot;)
{
if(faxnumber == &quot;&quot;)
{
faxnumber = Fields[15];
Fields[17] = faxnumber;
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(11, Fields[17].trim());
}
}
//Report the output values to the respective indexes
for (var i = 0; i &lt; 10; i++)
{
if(Fields[i]!=undefined &amp;&amp; Fields[i] != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(i, Fields[i].trim());
}
}
myRS.previous();
RS = myRS.getRow();
}
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="5181" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="5182" FP="A" P="0" N="no input"/><CP ID="5162" FP="X" P="0" N="NM103"/><CP ID="5163" FP="X" P="1" N="NM109"/><CP ID="5167" FP="X" P="2" N="N301"/><CP ID="5168" FP="X" P="3" N="N302"/><CP ID="5169" FP="X" P="4" N="N401"/><CP ID="5170" FP="X" P="5" N="N402"/><CP ID="5171" FP="X" P="6" N="N403"/><CP ID="5172" FP="X" P="7" N="N404"/><CP ID="5173" FP="X" P="8" N="REF01"/><CP ID="5174" FP="X" P="9" N="REF02"/><CP ID="5175" FP="X" P="10" N="PER04_PER06_telephoneNumber"/><CP ID="5176" FP="X" P="11" N="PER04_PER06_faxNumber"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="465" N="JavaScript_2010AA_N301_And_N302" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Concatenates address 1 and address 2.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var address1 = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(0);

value=address1;

N="else/actions/assignment_1/lvalue">5195</P><P N="else/actions/assignment_1/lvalue/type">2</P><P N="else/actions/assignment_1/rvalue">5196</P><P N="else/actions/assignment_1/rvalue/type">2</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="5196" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="5195" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="469" N="JavaScript_2010AA_TaxIdentificationNumber" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">if /837/2000A/2010AA/REF01 (Reference Identification Qualifieris ‘SY’ then it will be mapped into ‘XXX-XX-XXXX’ format to taxIdentificationNumber (institutionalClaim/supplierInformation/taxIdentificationNumber</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var refIDQua = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(0);
var refIDNum = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(1);
if(refIDQua==&quot;EI&quot;)
{
var r1 = refIDNum.substring(0,2);
var r2 = refIDNum.substring(2);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,r1+&quot;-&quot;+r2);//Changes to xx-xxxxxxx format
}</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="5198" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="5199" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="5197" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="474" N="JavaScript_2010AB_Pay-ToInfoInput" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Gets the input from 2010AB loop segments and  creates a recordset.
</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">/*The recordset &quot;BillingProviderSpecialityInformation&quot; has the next inforation:
00 - 2010AB.N301 - Address Line1
01 - 2010AB.N301 - Address Line2
02-2010AA.N401   - City Name
03-2010AA.N402   - State Code
04-2010AA.N403   - Postal Zone or ZIP Code)
05-2010AA.N404   - Country Code*/
myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;PayToInfo&quot;);
var value;
var resArr = new Array();
for (var i = 2; i &lt; 6; i++)
{
resArr[i] = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i);
}
var address1 = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(0);
var address2 = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(1);
if(address2!=&quot;&quot;)
value=address1+&quot;, &quot;+address2;
else if(address2==&quot;&quot;)
value=address1;
resArr[0]=value;
myRS.insertRow();
myRS.updateRow(resArr);
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;PayToInfo&quot;, myRS, true);
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="5446" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="5447" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="5448" FP="A" P="2" N="value3"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="5449" FP="A" P="3" N="value4"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="5450" FP="A" P="4" N="value5"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="5451" FP="A" P="5" N="value6"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="5445" FP="X" P="0" N="noOutput"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="475" N="JavaScript_2010AB_Pay-ToInfoOutput_SubscriberClaim" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Triggers the recordset based on the activation and maps the value to the target guideline.
</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">/*The recordset &quot;BillingProviderSpecialityInformation&quot; has the next inforation:
00 - 2010AB.N301 - Address Line1
01 - 2010AB.N301 - Address Line2
02-2010AA.N401   - City Name
03-2010AA.N402   - State Code
04-2010AA.N403   - Postal Zone or ZIP Code)
05-2010AA.N404   - Country Code*/
//Gets the recordset values to the myRS array
myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;PayToInfo&quot;);
//Assigns myRs array values to the array Fields
Fields = myRS.getFields();
//Assigns thee 'CountryCode' value as &quot;US&quot; if it is empty
if(Fields[5]=='')
Fields[5]='US';
//Report the results to the respective indexes
for (var i = 0; i &lt; 6; i++)
{
if(Fields[i]!=undefined)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(i, Fields[i].trim());
}
}</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="5458" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="5459" FP="A" P="0" N="noInput"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="5452" FP="X" P="0" N="N301"/><CP ID="5453" FP="X" P="1" N="noOutput"/><CP ID="5454" FP="X" P="2" N="N401"/><CP ID="5455" FP="X" P="3" N="N402"/><CP ID="5456" FP="X" P="4" N="N403"/><CP ID="5457" FP="X" P="5" N="N404"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="476" N="Substring_2010AB_ZipCode" T="Substring"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Take the first 5 bytes of the input.
</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="start">0</P><P N="length">5</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="5461" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="5460" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="477" N="Substring_2010AB_ZipCodeSuffix" T="Substring"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Take the last 4  bytes of the input
</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="start">5</P><P N="length">4</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="5463" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="5462" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="478" N="ConditionalCopy_2010AB_CountryCode" T="ConditionalCopy"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">‘CountryCode’ tag can is loaded as ‘US’ by default when there is no corresponding value in the N4 segment  in EDI.
</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/arg1">5465</P><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/arg1/type">2</P><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/operation">0</P><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/operation/type">0</P><P N="if_1/actions/assignment_1/lvalue">5464</P><P N="if_1/actions/assignment_1/lvalue/type">2</P><P N="if_1/actions/assignment_1/rvalue">US</P><P N="else/actions/assignment_1/lvalue">5464</P><P N="else/actions/assignment_1/lvalue/type">2</P><P N="else/actions/assignment_1/rvalue">5465</P><P N="else/actions/assignment_1/rvalue/type">2</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="5465" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="5464" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="481" N="JavaScript_2010AB_Pay-ToInfoOutput_PatientClaim" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Triggers the recordset based on the activation.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">/*The recordset &quot;BillingProviderSpecialityInformation&quot; has the next inforation:
00 - 2010AB.N301 - Address Line1
01 - 2010AB.N301 - Address Line2
02-2010AA.N401   - City Name
03-2010AA.N402   - State Code
04-2010AA.N403   - Postal Zone or ZIP Code)
05-2010AA.N404   - Country Code*/
//Gets the recordset values to the myRS array
myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;PayToInfo&quot;);
//Assigns myRs array values to the array Fields
Fields = myRS.getFields();
//Assigns thee 'CountryCode' value as &quot;US&quot; if it is empty
if(Fields[5]=='')
Fields[5]='US';
//Report the results to the respective indexes
for (var i = 0; i &lt; 6; i++)
{
if(Fields[i]!=undefined)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(i, Fields[i]);
}
}</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="5693" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="5694" FP="A" P="0" N="noInput"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="5687" FP="X" P="0" N="N301"/><CP ID="5688" FP="X" P="1" N="noOutput"/><CP ID="5689" FP="X" P="2" N="N401"/><CP ID="5690" FP="X" P="3" N="N402"/><CP ID="5691" FP="X" P="4" N="N403"/><CP ID="5692" FP="X" P="5" N="N404"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="482" N="Substring_2010AB_ZipCode" T="Substring"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Take the first 5 bytes from the input string.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="start">0</P><P N="length">5</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="5696" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="5695" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="483" N="Substring_2010AB_ZipCodeSuffix" T="Substring"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Take 4 bytes starting from the 6th character of the input string.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="start">5</P><P N="length">4</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="5698" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="5697" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="496" N="2000B_SBR_Output" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">The recordset is triggered based on the given activation and maps the ouptut to the target guideline.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">/*Record Set &quot;SBR&quot; has next information:
00-2000B.SBR02  - Individual Relationship Code
01-2000B.SBR03  - Reference Identification
02-2000B.SBR04  -Name
03-2000B.SBR09*/
//Get the recordset values to the array &quot;myRS&quot;
myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;RS_SBR&quot;);
//Assigns the recordset array values to the array Fields
Fields = myRS.getFields();
//Report the results to the respective indexes
for (var i = 0; i &lt; 4; i++)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(i, Fields[i]);
ec_ResultHelper.Send();</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="5749" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="5750" FP="A" P="0" N="noInput"/><CP ID="5745" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/><CP ID="5746" FP="X" P="1" N="result2"/><CP ID="5747" FP="X" P="2" N="result3"/><CP ID="5748" FP="X" P="3" N="result4"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="499" N="2000B_SBR_Input" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Gets the input from SBR segment and  creates a recordset.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">/*Record Set &quot;SBR&quot; has next information:
00-2000B.SBR02  - Individual Relationship Code
01-2000B.SBR03  - Reference Identification
02-2000B.SBR04  -Name
03-2000B.SBR09*/
//Get the recordset values to the myRS array
myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;RS_SBR&quot;);
resArr = new Array();
//Assigns the input values to the array resArr
for(i=0;i&lt;4;i++)
{
resArr[i] = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i);
}
//resArr values are inserted to thr recordset
myRS.insertRow();
myRS.updateRow(resArr);
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;RS_SBR&quot;, myRS, true);</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="5755" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="5756" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="5757" FP="A" P="2" N="value3"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="5758" FP="A" P="3" N="value4"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="5754" FP="X" P="0" N="noOutput"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="518" N="2000B_SBR_Output_PatientClaim" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Trigger the reecordset based on activation.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">/*Record Set &quot;SBR&quot; has next information:
00-2000B.SBR02  - Individual Relationship Code
01-2000B.SBR03  - Reference Identification
02-2000B.SBR04  -Name
03-2000B.SBR09*/
//Get the recordset values to the array myRS
myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;RS_SBR&quot;);
//Get the recordset array values to the array Fields
Fields = myRS.getFields();
//Report the results
for (var i = 0; i &lt; 4; i++)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(i, Fields[i].trim());
ec_ResultHelper.Send();</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="5824" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="5825" FP="A" P="0" N="noInput"/><CP ID="5820" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/><CP ID="5821" FP="X" P="1" N="result2"/><CP ID="5822" FP="X" P="2" N="result3"/><CP ID="5823" FP="X" P="3" N="result4"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="531" N="JavaScript_2000C_PatientInfoOutput" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Trigger the recordset based on activation.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">/*Record Set &quot;Patient&quot; has next information:
00-2000C.PAT01 - IndividualRelationshipCode
01-2010CA.NM103 - Last Name
02-2010CA.NM104 - First Name
03-2010CA.NM105 - Middle Name or Initial
04-2010CA.NM107 - Name Suffix
05-2010CA.DMG02 - Birth Date
06-2010CA.DMG03 - Gender Code*/
//Retrieve the recordset values
myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;Patient&quot;);
//Get the recordset values to the array &quot;Fields&quot;
Fields = myRS.getFields();
var date = Fields[5];
//Changes date to the format YYYY-MM-DD
var date1 = date.substring(0,4);
var date2 = date.substring(4,6);
var date3 = date.substring(6,8);
Fields[5]=date1+&quot;-&quot;+date2+&quot;-&quot;+date3;
if(Fields[11] !=&quot;&quot;)
{
Fields[11] = Fields[11];
}
else
Fields[11] = &quot;US&quot;;
//Report the array elements to corresponding indexes
for(var i = 0; i &lt; 7; i++)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(i,Fields[i].trim());
}
for(var i = 7; i &lt; 12; i++)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(i+1,Fields[i].trim());
}
var a1 = Fields[1].trim()
var a2 = Fields[2].trim()
var a3 = Fields[3].trim()
var a4 = Fields[4].trim()
var patientName;
/*if (a2) {
patientName = a2;
}
if (a3) {
if (patientName) {
patientName += &quot;,&quot; + a3;
} else {
patientName = a3;
}
}
if (a3) {
if (patientName) {
patientName += &quot;,&quot; + a3;
} else {
patientName = a3;
}
}
if (a4) {
if (patientName) {
patientName += &quot;,&quot; + a4;
} else {
patientName = a4;
}
}*/
patientName = a1+&quot;,&quot;+a3+&quot;,&quot;+a2+&quot;,&quot;+a4;
if(patientName!=undefined)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(7,patientName.trim());//Trim spaces </P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="5879" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="5880" FP="A" P="0" N="noInput"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="5872" FP="X" P="0" N="PAT01"/><CP ID="5873" FP="X" P="1" N="NM103"/><CP ID="5874" FP="X" P="2" N="NM104"/><CP ID="5875" FP="X" P="3" N="NM105"/><CP ID="5876" FP="X" P="4" N="NM107"/><CP ID="5877" FP="X" P="5" N="DMG02"/><CP ID="5878" FP="X" P="6" N="DMG03"/><CP ID="12651" FP="X" P="7" N="patientName"/><CP ID="14647" FP="X" P="8" N="N301"/><CP ID="14648" FP="X" P="9" N="N401"/><CP ID="14649" FP="X" P="10" N="N402"/><CP ID="14650" FP="X" P="11" N="N403"/><CP ID="14651" FP="X" P="12" N="N404"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="550" N="JavaScript_2000C_PantientInfoInput" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Form recordset with the input values.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">/*Record Set &quot;Patient&quot; has next information:
00-2000C.PAT01 - IndividualRelationshipCode
01-2010CA.NM103 - Last Name
02-2010CA.NM104 - First Name
03-2010CA.NM105 - Middle Name or Initial
04-2010CA.NM107 - Name Suffix
05-2010CA.DMG02 - Birth Date
06-2010CA.DMG03 - Gender Code*/
//Retrieve the recordset values
myRs = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;Patient&quot;);
resArr = new Array();
//Get the input values to the array &quot;resArr&quot;
for(i=0;i&lt;12;i++)
{
resArr[i] = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i);
}
//Update the recordset with the values of the array &quot;resArr&quot;
myRS.insertRow();
myRS.updateRow(resArr);
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;Patient&quot;, myRS, true);
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="5929" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="5930" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="5931" FP="A" P="2" N="value3"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="5932" FP="A" P="3" N="value4"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="5933" FP="A" P="4" N="value5"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="5934" FP="A" P="5" N="value6"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="5935" FP="A" P="6" N="value7"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="14637" FP="A" P="7" N="value8"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="14638" FP="A" P="8" N="value9"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="14640" FP="A" P="9" N="value10"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="14641" FP="A" P="10" N="value11"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="14642" FP="A" P="11" N="value12"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="5928" FP="X" P="0" N="noOutput"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="552" N="ConersionalCopy_2000CA_GenderCode" T="ConversionalCopy"><Ps C="S"><P N="in">,M,F,U</P><P N="out">,Male,Female,Unknown</P><P N="comment">,,,</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="5941" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="5940" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="628" T="ChangeVariable"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Stores the value of N301.
