myRS1.updateRow(resArr1);
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;Claim_Info_input5_2000C&quot;, myRS1, true);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,&quot;Claim_Info_input5_2000C&quot;);</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="11011" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11012" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11013" FP="A" P="2" N="value3"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11014" FP="A" P="3" N="value4"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11015" FP="A" P="4" N="value5"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11016" FP="A" P="5" N="value6"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11017" FP="A" P="6" N="value7"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11018" FP="A" P="7" N="value8"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11019" FP="A" P="8" N="value9"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11020" FP="A" P="9" N="value10"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11021" FP="A" P="10" N="value11"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11022" FP="A" P="11" N="value12"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11010" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1401" N="JavaScript-Trigger-Claim_Info_Output5" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{df450e4e-e4da-45d3-a02c-cf9fcffb29f5}">Triggering Record of claim information in 2000B loop</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">// Retrieving the record set or creating the recordset
myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;Claim_Info_input5_2000C&quot;);
Fields = myRS.getFields();
for(var i = 0; i &lt; 12; i++)
{
if(Fields[i] != &quot;&quot;)
{
var DiagnosisCode = Fields[i];
if(DiagnosisCode.length &gt; 3)
{
// Insert a dot (.) character after the third character of the DiagnosisCode
var char = &quot;.&quot;;
var OrgDiagnosisCode = DiagnosisCode.substring(0,3) + char + DiagnosisCode.substring(3,DiagnosisCode.length);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(i,OrgDiagnosisCode);//Report the result for the modified DiagnosisCode at index i
}
else
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(i,DiagnosisCode);
}
}
}
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="11049" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11050" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="11037" FP="X" P="0" N="HI01.02"/><CP ID="11038" FP="X" P="1" N="HI02.02"/><CP ID="11039" FP="X" P="2" N="HI03.02"/><CP ID="11040" FP="X" P="3" N="HI04.02"/><CP ID="11041" FP="X" P="4" N="HI05.02"/><CP ID="11042" FP="X" P="5" N="HI06.02"/><CP ID="11043" FP="X" P="6" N="HI07.02"/><CP ID="11044" FP="X" P="7" N="HI08.02"/><CP ID="11045" FP="X" P="8" N="HI09.02"/><CP ID="11046" FP="X" P="9" N="HI10.02"/><CP ID="11047" FP="X" P="10" N="HI11.02"/><CP ID="11048" FP="X" P="11" N="HI12.02"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1406" N="JavaScript-Pay-To-Address 2010AB--2000B" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{df450e4e-e4da-45d3-a02c-cf9fcffb29f5}">Mapping done for Pay-To-Address </P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">// Retrieving variables
var N301 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Address_2010AB_2000B&quot;).trim();
var N401 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N401_CityName_2010AB_2000B&quot;);
var N402 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N402_StateCode_2010AB_2000B&quot;);
var N403 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N403_PostalCode_2010AB_2000B&quot;);
var N404 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N404_CountryCode_2010AB_2000B&quot;);
// Checking if variables are not empty
if(N301 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,N301);
}
if(N401 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,N401);
}
if(N402 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2,N402);
}
if(N403 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(3,N403);
}
if(N404 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(4,N404);
}
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="11119" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11117" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="11118" FP="X" P="0" N="N301"/><CP ID="11120" FP="X" P="1" N="N401"/><CP ID="11121" FP="X" P="2" N="N402"/><CP ID="11122" FP="X" P="3" N="N403"/><CP ID="11123" FP="X" P="4" N="N404"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1408" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var Add1 = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(0);
var Add2 = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(1);
// Checking if both Add1 and Add2 variables are not empty
if(Add1 != &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; Add2 != &quot;&quot;)
{
// Concatenating Add1 and Add2 with a comma
var Add = Add1 + &quot;,&quot; + Add2 ;
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,Add);
}
// Checking if Add1 is empty and Add2 is not empty
if(Add1 == &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; Add2 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,Add2);
}
// Checking if Add1 is not empty and Add2 is empty
if(Add1 != &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; Add2 == &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,Add1);
}
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="11131" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11128" FP="A" P="0" N="value1" DirectValue="{39}"/><CP ID="11130" FP="A" P="1" N="value2" DirectValue="{40}"/><CP ID="11129" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1409" N="JavaScript-2000B-PAT Information" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{df450e4e-e4da-45d3-a02c-cf9fcffb29f5}">Nullcheck using javascrpit done for PAT </P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">// Retrieving variables
var PAT06 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;PAT06_2000B_DOD&quot;);
var PAT08 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;PAT08_2000B_Wt&quot;);
var PAT09 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;PAT09_2000B_PRGT&quot;);
var SBR02 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;SBR02_RelationshipCode_2000B&quot;);
// Checking if variable are not empty
if(PAT06 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,PAT06);
}
if(PAT08 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,PAT08);
}
if(PAT09 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2,PAT09);
}
if(SBR02 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(3,SBR02);
}
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="11134" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11132" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="11133" FP="X" P="0" N="PAT06"/><CP ID="11136" FP="X" P="1" N="PAT08"/><CP ID="11137" FP="X" P="2" N="PAT09"/><CP ID="11194" FP="X" P="3" N="SBR02"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1414" N="JavaScript-2010CA-MemberInformation-2000C" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{df450e4e-e4da-45d3-a02c-cf9fcffb29f5}">Mapping membeInformation for Patientclaim from 2010CA loop</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">//Retrieving the values from variables
var MemberFullName;
var NM103 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;NM103_2010CA_NameLast&quot;).trim();
var NM104 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;NM104_2010CA_NameFirst&quot;).trim();
var NM105 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;NM105_2010CA_MiddleName&quot;).trim();
var NM107 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;NM107_2010CA_NameSuffix&quot;).trim();
var N301 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N301_2010CA_StreetAddress&quot;).trim();
var N401 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N401_2010CA_CityName&quot;).trim();
var N402 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N402_2010CA_StateCode&quot;).trim();
var N403 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N403_2010CA_PostalCode&quot;).trim();
var N404 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N404_2010CA_CountryCode&quot;).trim();
var DMG03 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;DMG03_2010CA_GenderCode&quot;).trim();
var DMG02 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;DMG02_2010CA_DOB&quot;).trim();
var PER04 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;PER04_2010CA_CommNum&quot;).trim();
var PER06 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;PER06_2010CA_CommNum&quot;).trim();
// Concatenate the name components to form the member's full name
// if (NM104) {
// MemberFullName = NM104;
// }
// if (NM105) {
// if (MemberFullName) {
// MemberFullName += &quot;,&quot; + NM105;
// } else {
// MemberFullName = NM105;
// }
// }
// if (NM103) {
// if (MemberFullName) {
// MemberFullName += &quot;,&quot; + NM103;
// } else {
// MemberFullName = NM103;
// }
// }
// if (NM107) {
// if (MemberFullName) {
// MemberFullName += &quot;,&quot; + NM107;
// } else {
// MemberFullName = NM107;
// }
// }
MemberFullName =NM103+&quot;,&quot;+NM105+&quot;,&quot;+NM104+&quot;,&quot;+NM107;
//Trim and report the result
if(MemberFullName!= &quot;&quot;)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,MemberFullName.trim());
// Check if  variables are not empty and report its value at indexes
if(NM103 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,NM103)
}
if(NM104 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2,NM104)
}
if(NM105 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(3,NM105)
}
if(NM107 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(4,NM107)
}
if(N301 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(5,N301)
}
if(N401 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(6,N401)
}
if(N402 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(7,N402)
}
if(N403 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(8,N403)
}
if(N404 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(9,N404)
}
else if(N404 == &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(9,&quot;US&quot;);
}
if(DMG03 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(10,DMG03)
}
if(DMG02 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(11,DMG02)
}
if(PER04 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(12,PER04)
}
if(PER06 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(13,PER06)
}
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="11149" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11147" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="11148" FP="X" P="0" N="MemberFullName"/><CP ID="11150" FP="X" P="1" N="NM103"/><CP ID="11151" FP="X" P="2" N="NM104"/><CP ID="11152" FP="X" P="3" N="NM105"/><CP ID="11153" FP="X" P="4" N="NM107"/><CP ID="11154" FP="X" P="5" N="N301"/><CP ID="11155" FP="X" P="6" N="N401"/><CP ID="11156" FP="X" P="7" N="N402"/><CP ID="11157" FP="X" P="8" N="N403"/><CP ID="11158" FP="X" P="9" N="N404"/><CP ID="11159" FP="X" P="10" N="DMG03"/><CP ID="11160" FP="X" P="11" N="DMG02"/><CP ID="11161" FP="X" P="12" N="PER04"/><CP ID="11162" FP="X" P="13" N="PER06"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1416" T="ConversionalCopy"><Ps C="S"><P N="in">,M,F,U</P><P N="out">,Male,Female,Unknown</P><P N="comment">,,,</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="11166" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11165" FP="X" N="DMG03"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1427" N="JavaScript-2000B-PAT Information" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{df450e4e-e4da-45d3-a02c-cf9fcffb29f5}">Nullcheck using javascrpit done for PAT </P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">// Retrieving variables
var PAT06 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;PAT06_2000B_DOD&quot;);
var PAT08 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;PAT08_2000B_Wt&quot;);
var PAT09 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;PAT09_2000B_PRGT&quot;);
var SBR02 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;SBR02_RelationshipCode_2000B&quot;);
// Checking if variable are not empty
if(PAT06 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,PAT06);
}
if(PAT08 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,PAT08);
}
if(PAT09 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2,PAT09);
}
if(SBR02 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(3,SBR02);
}
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="11206" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11207" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="11202" FP="X" P="0" N="PAT06"/><CP ID="11203" FP="X" P="1" N="PAT08"/><CP ID="11204" FP="X" P="2" N="PAT09"/><CP ID="11205" FP="X" P="3" N="SBR02"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1428" N="JavaScript-referringPractitionerInformation" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{df450e4e-e4da-45d3-a02c-cf9fcffb29f5}">Mapping referringPractitionerInformation after nullchecking</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">//Retrieving the values from variables
var ReferringPractitionerName = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;ReferringPractitionerName_2310A_2000B&quot;);
var NM103 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;NM103_2310A_ReferringProvider_2000B&quot;);
var NM104 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;NM104_NameFirst_2310A_2000B&quot;);
var NM105 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;NM105_NameMiddle_2310A_2000B&quot;);
var NM107 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;NM107_NameSuffix_2310A_2000B&quot;);
var NM109 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;NM109_IdentificationCode_2310A_2000B&quot;);
var REF01 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;REF01_REFID_2310A_2000B&quot;);
var REF02 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;REF02_REFID_2310A_2000B&quot;);
var referralNum =ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;ReferralNumber_2000B&quot;);
//Check if  variables are not empty and report its value at indexes
if(ReferringPractitionerName != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,ReferringPractitionerName.trim())
}
if(NM103 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,NM103.trim())
}
if(NM104 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2,NM104.trim())
}
if(NM105 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(3,NM105.trim())
}
if(NM107 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(4,NM107.trim())
}
if(NM109 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(5,NM109.trim())
}
if(REF01 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(6,REF01.trim())
}
if(REF02 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(7,REF02.trim())
}
if(referralNum !=&quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; ReferringPractitionerName != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(8,referralNum.trim())
}
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="11210" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11208" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="11209" FP="X" P="0" N="NM103+04"/><CP ID="11211" FP="X" P="1" N="NM103"/><CP ID="11212" FP="X" P="2" N="NM104"/><CP ID="11213" FP="X" P="3" N="NM105"/><CP ID="11214" FP="X" P="4" N="NM107"/><CP ID="11215" FP="X" P="5" N="NM109"/><CP ID="11216" FP="X" P="6" N="REF01"/><CP ID="11217" FP="X" P="7" N="REF02"/><CP ID="12669" FP="X" P="8" N="2300_REF02(referralNumb)"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1431" N="JavaScript-TriggerRecordsets-2010AA" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{df450e4e-e4da-45d3-a02c-cf9fcffb29f5}">Mapping Done for supplier Information only  by triggering the Record sets Using Javascript .
</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">//Obtain record sets
myRS1 = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;BillingProvider_2000A&quot;);
myRS2 = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;Rendering_Prov_2310B_2000C&quot;);
myRS3 = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;Rendering_Prov_2420A_2000C&quot;);
//Retrieve fields from record sets
Fields3 = myRS3.getFields();
Fields2 = myRS2.getFields();
Fields1 = myRS1.getFields();
//Check if Fields1[1] is equal to 1 then report the values
if(Fields1[1]== 1)        //first name
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,Fields1[3].trim());
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
}
if(Fields1[1]== 1)//middle name
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,Fields1[4].trim());
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
}
if(Fields1[1]== 1)//name suffi
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2,Fields1[5].trim());
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
}
if(Fields1[7] != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(3,Fields1[7].trim());
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
}
if (Fields1[8] != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(8,Fields1[8].trim());
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
}
if(Fields1[12] == &quot;&quot;) //Country Code
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(4,&quot;US&quot;);
}
else
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(4,Fields1[12].trim());
}
if(Fields1[13] == &quot;EI&quot;)// REF02-TaxIdentification Number
{
var Referenceid = Fields1[14];
var Appendchar= &quot;-&quot;
var pos=2
// Modify the format of reference_id by adding a hyphen
Referenceid = Referenceid.substring(0,pos)+ Appendchar + Referenceid.substring(pos,Referenceid.length);
//Report the modified reference_id as a result
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(5,Referenceid.trim());
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
}
else if(Fields1[13] == &quot;SY&quot;)
{
var Referenceid = Fields1[14];
var Appendchar= &quot;-&quot;
//var pos=2
//Modify the format of reference_id by adding hyphens at specific positions
Referenceid = Referenceid.substring(0,3)+ Appendchar + Referenceid.substring(3,5) + Appendchar + Referenceid.substring(5,Referenceid.length);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(5,Referenceid.trim());
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
}
if(Fields1[13] == &quot;SY&quot;) //otherid
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(6,Fields1[14].trim());
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
}
else if(Fields1[15] == &quot;1G&quot; || Fields1[15] == &quot;0B&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(6,Fields1[16].trim());
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
}
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(7,Fields1[2].trim());//supplierName
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="11277" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11278" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="11269" FP="X" P="0" N="NM104"/><CP ID="11270" FP="X" P="1" N="NM105"/><CP ID="11271" FP="X" P="2" N="NM107"/><CP ID="11272" FP="X" P="3" N="N301,N302"/><CP ID="11273" FP="X" P="4" N="N404"/><CP ID="11274" FP="X" P="5" N="REF02-Taxid"/><CP ID="11275" FP="X" P="6" N="REF02"/><CP ID="11276" FP="X" P="7" N="NM103"/><CP ID="12676" FP="X" P="8" N="N302"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1436" N="JavaScript-Supplierinformation" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{df450e4e-e4da-45d3-a02c-cf9fcffb29f5}">Supplierinformations from record set BillingProvider_2000A are mapped using this java script function
</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">// Retrieving the record set or creating the recordset
myRS1 = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;BillingProvider_2000A&quot;);
myRS1.last();
var telephone = &quot;&quot;;
var telephone1 =&quot;&quot;;
var telephone2=&quot;&quot;;
var telephone3=&quot;&quot;;
var telephone4=&quot;&quot;;
var RS = myRS1.getRow();
while(RS&gt;0)
{
Fields1 = myRS1.getFields();
// Reporting communication details if available
if(Fields1[17]!= &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; Fields1[21]== &quot;TE&quot;)
{
//ec_ResultHelper.println(&quot;teout&quot;+telephone)
if (telephone == &quot;&quot;)
{
telephone = Fields1[17];
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,telephone);
//ec_ResultHelper.println(&quot;te&quot;+telephone)
ec_ResultHelper.Send();//Communication details
}
}
if(Fields1[18]!= &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; Fields1[20]== &quot;TE&quot; &amp;&amp; Fields1[21]!= &quot;TE&quot;)
{
if (telephone1 == &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; telephone == &quot;&quot;)
{
telephone1 = Fields1[18];
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,telephone1);
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
}
}
if(Fields1[20] == &quot;EX&quot; &amp;&amp; Fields1[18]!= &quot;&quot;)
{
if (telephone2 == &quot;&quot;)
{
telephone2 = Fields1[18];
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,telephone2);
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
}
}
if(Fields1[22] == &quot;EX&quot; &amp;&amp; Fields1[23]!= &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; Fields1[20] != &quot;EX&quot;)
{
if (telephone3 == &quot;&quot;&amp;&amp; telephone2 == &quot;&quot;)
{
telephone3 = Fields1[23];
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,telephone3);
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
}
}
myRS1.previous();
RS = myRS1.getRow();
}
// Retrieving the record set or creating the recordset
myRS2 = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;BillingProvider_2000A&quot;);
myRS2.last();
Fields2 = myRS2.getFields();
// Reporting Tax Code if available
if(Fields2[13]!= &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2,Fields2[13]);//TaxCode
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
}
// Reporting City Name if available
if(Fields2[9]!= &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(3,Fields2[9].trim());//City Name
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
}
// Reporting State Code if available
if(Fields2[10]!= &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(4,Fields2[10]);//State Code
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
}
// Reporting Postal Code if available
if(Fields2[11]!= &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(5,Fields2[11]);//Postal Code
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
}
// Reporting Supplier Billing Name if available
if(Fields2[2]!= &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(6,Fields2[2].trim());//SupplierBilling Name
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
}
// Reporting NPI if available
if(Fields2[6]!= &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(7,Fields2[6]);//npi
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
}
// Reporting IdentificationCode if available
if(Fields2[0]!= &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(8,Fields2[0]);//code
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
}
// Reporting Qualifier if available
if(Fields2[19]!= &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(9,Fields2[19]);//Qualifier
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
}
// Reporting Supplier PIN Number if IG
if(Fields2[15] == &quot;1G&quot;) //Supllier PIN Number
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(10,Fields2[16]);
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
}
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="11309" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11310" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="11298" FP="X" P="0" N="PER03"/><CP ID="11299" FP="X" P="1" N="PER06"/><CP ID="11300" FP="X" P="2" N="REF01"/><CP ID="11301" FP="X" P="3" N="N401"/><CP ID="11302" FP="X" P="4" N="N402"/><CP ID="11303" FP="X" P="5" N="N403"/><CP ID="11304" FP="X" P="6" N="NM103"/><CP ID="11305" FP="X" P="7" N="NM109"/><CP ID="11306" FP="X" P="8" N="PRV03"/><CP ID="11307" FP="X" P="9" N="PRV02"/><CP ID="11308" FP="X" P="10" N="REF02-PIN"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1441" N="JavaScript-Pay-To-Address 2010AB-2000C" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{df450e4e-e4da-45d3-a02c-cf9fcffb29f5}">Mapping done for Pay-To-Address
</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">// Retrieving variables
var N301 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Address_2010AB_2000B&quot;).trim();
var N401 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N401_CityName_2010AB_2000B&quot;);
var N402 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N402_StateCode_2010AB_2000B&quot;);
var N403 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N403_PostalCode_2010AB_2000B&quot;);
var N404 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N404_CountryCode_2010AB_2000B&quot;);
// Checking if variables are not empty
if(N301 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,N301);
}
if(N401 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,N401);
}
if(N402 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2,N402);
}
if(N403 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(3,N403);
}
if(N404 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(4,N404);
}
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="11329" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11330" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="11324" FP="X" P="0" N="N301"/><CP ID="11325" FP="X" P="1" N="N401"/><CP ID="11326" FP="X" P="2" N="N402"/><CP ID="11327" FP="X" P="3" N="N403"/><CP ID="11328" FP="X" P="4" N="N404"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1444" N="JavaScript-referringPractitionerInformation" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{df450e4e-e4da-45d3-a02c-cf9fcffb29f5}">Mapping referringPractitionerInformation after nullchecking</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">//Retrieving the values from variables
var ReferringPractitionerName = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;ReferringPractitionerName_2310A_2000C&quot;).trim();
var NM103 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;NM103_2310A_ReferringProvider_2000C&quot;).trim();
var NM104 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;NM104_NameFirst_2310A_2000C&quot;).trim();
var NM105 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;NM105_NameMiddle_2310A_2000C&quot;).trim();
var NM107 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;NM107_NameSuffix_2310A_2000C&quot;).trim();
var NM109 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;NM109_IdentificationCode_2310A_2000C&quot;).trim();
var REF01 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;REF01_REFID_2310A_2000C&quot;).trim();
var REF02 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;REF02_REFID_2310A_2000C&quot;).trim();
var referralNum = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;ReferralNumber_2000C&quot;).trim();
// Check if  variables are not empty and report its value at indexes
if(ReferringPractitionerName != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,ReferringPractitionerName)
}
if(NM103 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,NM103)
}
if(NM104 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2,NM104)
}
if(NM105 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(3,NM105)
}
if(NM107 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(4,NM107)
}
if(NM109 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(5,NM109)
}
if(REF01 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(6,REF01)
}
if(REF02 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(7,REF02)
}
if(referralNum !=&quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; ReferringPractitionerName != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(8,referralNum)
}
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="11356" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11357" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="11348" FP="X" P="0" N="NM103+04"/><CP ID="11349" FP="X" P="1" N="NM103"/><CP ID="11350" FP="X" P="2" N="NM104"/><CP ID="11351" FP="X" P="3" N="NM105"/><CP ID="11352" FP="X" P="4" N="NM107"/><CP ID="11353" FP="X" P="5" N="NM109"/><CP ID="11354" FP="X" P="6" N="REF01"/><CP ID="11355" FP="X" P="7" N="REF02"/><CP ID="12673" FP="X" P="8" N="2300_REF02(referralNumb)"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1450" T="ChangeVariable"><Ps C="S"><P N="variableID">150</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="11369" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1451" T="SetValue"><CPs><CP ID="11371" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11372" FP="A" N="v" DirectValue="{150}"/><CP ID="11370" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1452" T="ConditionalCopy"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{df450e4e-e4da-45d3-a02c-cf9fcffb29f5}">Mapping AMT02 value as memresp amt to based on the activation of eobinformation tag </P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/arg1">11374</P><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/arg1/type">2</P><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/operation">1</P><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/operation/type">0</P><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/arg2">0</P><P N="if_1/actions/assignment_1/lvalue">11373</P><P N="if_1/actions/assignment_1/lvalue/type">2</P><P N="if_1/actions/assignment_1/rvalue">11374</P><P N="if_1/actions/assignment_1/rvalue/type">2</P><P N="else/actions/assignment_1/lvalue">11373</P><P N="else/actions/assignment_1/lvalue/type">2</P><P N="else/actions/assignment_1/rvalue">0</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="11374" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11373" FP="X" P="0" N="2430-AMT02"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1453" N="JavaScript-ServiceLineLoop_Input1" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">// Retrieving the record set or creating the recordset

{
var PhoneAreaCode = Per04.substring(0, 3);

var phnnum = Per04.substr(-7);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,Countrycode);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,PhoneAreaCode);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2,phnnum);
}
else if(length = 10)
{
var PhoneAreaCode = Per04.substring(0, 3);

N="if_1/actions/assignment_1/rvalue">Y</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12293" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12294" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="12292" FP="X" P="0" N="out_format">yyyy-MM-dd</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12300" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12299" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1671" T="ChangeVariable"><Ps C="S"><P N="variableID">114</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12306" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12305" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1674" T="ChangeVariable"><Ps C="S"><P N="variableID">46</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12312" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12311" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1676" N="ServiceAdjustmentInputAll for SeviceLine" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var Line_PayerCheck = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Line_PayerCheck_2000B&quot;);
var resArr = new Array();
var lineNum = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(19);
var payerId = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(20);
var myRSLine_Payer = lineNum + &quot;-&quot; + payerId;
myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;ServiceAdjustment_2000B&quot;);
myRS.first();
var arrayLinePayer = &quot;&quot;;
var found_payer = 0;
if(Line_PayerCheck.length &gt; 0)
{
var splitRes = Line_PayerCheck.split(&quot;|&quot;);
for(var j=0;j&lt;splitRes.length;j++)
{
if (splitRes[j] == myRSLine_Payer)
{
found_payer = 1;
}
}
}
if (found_payer == 0)
{
for (var i = 0; i &lt; 21; i++) resArr [i] = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i);
myRS.insertRow();
myRS.updateRow(resArr);
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;ServiceAdjustment_2000B&quot;, myRS, true);
}
else
{
//Update/Add to existing row:
var casArray_Temp = new Array();//create new array
for (var i = 0; i &lt; 21; i++) casArray_Temp [i] = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i); //casArray_Temp[19]-linenum,casArray_Temp[20]-svd01
var counter = 0;
var newCASArray = new Array(21); //creating array with length 21
for(var j=1; j&lt;casArray_Temp.length-2; j=j+3)
{
var found_CAS = 0;
myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;ServiceAdjustment_2000B&quot;);
myRS.first();
var RS1 = myRS.getRow();
while(RS1&gt;0)
{
Fields = myRS.getFields();
arrayLinePayer = Fields[19] + &quot;-&quot; + Fields[20];
if(myRSLine_Payer == arrayLinePayer)
{
if(casArray_Temp[0] == Fields[0])
{
switch (casArray_Temp[j])
{
case Fields[1]:
Fields[2] = +Fields[2] + +casArray_Temp[j+1];
if(casArray_Temp[j+2] != &quot;&quot;)
{
Fields[3] = +Fields[3] + +casArray_Temp[j+2];
}
found_CAS = 1;
break;
case Fields[4]:
Fields[5] = +Fields[5] + +casArray_Temp[j+1];
if(casArray_Temp[j+2] != &quot;&quot;)
{
Fields[6] = +Fields[6] + +casArray_Temp[j+2];
}
found_CAS = 1;
break;
case Fields[7]:
Fields[8] = +Fields[8] + +casArray_Temp[j+1];
if(casArray_Temp[j+2] != &quot;&quot;)
{
Fields[9] = +Fields[9] + +casArray_Temp[j+2];
}
found_CAS = 1;
break;
case Fields[10]:
Fields[11] = +Fields[11] + +casArray_Temp[j+1];
if(casArray_Temp[j+2] != &quot;&quot;)
{
Fields[12] = +Fields[12] + +casArray_Temp[j+2];
}
found_CAS = 1;
break;
case Fields[13]:
Fields[14] = +Fields[14] + +casArray_Temp[j+1];
if(casArray_Temp[j+2] != &quot;&quot;)
{
Fields[15] = +Fields[15] + +casArray_Temp[j+2];
}
found_CAS = 1;
break;
case Fields[16]:
Fields[17] = +Fields[17] + +casArray_Temp[j+1];
if(casArray_Temp[j+2] != &quot;&quot;)
{
Fields[18] = +Fields[18] + +casArray_Temp[j+2];
}
found_CAS = 1;
break;
}
myRS.updateRow(Fields);
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;ServiceAdjustment_2000B&quot;, myRS, true);
}
}
myRS.next();
RS1 = myRS.getRow();
}
if ((found_CAS == 0) &amp;&amp; (casArray_Temp[j]!=&quot;undefined&quot;) &amp;&amp; (casArray_Temp[j]!=&quot;&quot;))
{
if (counter == 0)
{
newCASArray[19] = casArray_Temp[19];
newCASArray[20] = casArray_Temp[20];
newCASArray[0] = casArray_Temp[0];
}
counter = counter + 1;
newCASArray[counter] = casArray_Temp[j];
newCASArray[counter+1] = casArray_Temp[j+1];
newCASArray[counter+2] = casArray_Temp[j+2];
}
}
if (newCASArray.length &gt; 0)
{
myRS.insertRow();
myRS.updateRow(newCASArray);
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;ServiceAdjustment_2000B&quot;, myRS, true);
//ec_ResultHelper.println(&quot;Else part 2000C RS&quot; + myRS)
}
}
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12342" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12345" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12346" FP="A" output"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1678" N="JavaScript_RecordSet" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{df450e4e-e4da-45d3-a02c-cf9fcffb29f5}">Clearing Record Set LineCAS_CO_PR_2000B</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">//Reseting the recorset ie,removing junk values
myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;LineCAS_CO_PR_2000B&quot;);
myRS.clear();</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12368" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12369" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="12367" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1680" N="ServiceAdjustmentInputAll for SeviceLine" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">//ec_ResultHelper.println(&quot;entering 2000c loop for fetching values&quot;)
myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;ServiceAdjustment_2000C&quot;);
myRS.first();
var resArr = new Array();
for (var i = 0; i &lt; 19; i++) resArr [i] = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i);
myRS.insertRow();
myRS.updateRow(resArr);
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;ServiceAdjustment_2000C&quot;, myRS, true);

date = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(1);
var dateQualifer = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(0);
if(date.includes(&quot;-&quot;))
{
var split = date.split('-');
var startDate = split[0];
var endDate = split[1];
}
else{
var startDate = date;
var endDate = startDate;
}
if(dateQualifer == 314 || dateQualifer == 360)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,startDate);
}
if(dateQualifer == 314 || dateQualifer == 361)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,endDate);
}</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12493" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12496" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12494" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/><CP ID="12495" FP="X" P="1" N="result2"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1709" N="JavaScript-Disability Dates" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var date = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(1);

var date  = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(1);
if(qualifier == &quot;RD8&quot;)
{
var firstDateString = date.substring(0, 8);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,firstDateString);
var secondDateString = date.substring(9);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,secondDateString);
}
else if(qualifier == &quot;D8&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,date);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,date);
}
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12647" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12649" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12648" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/><CP ID="12650" FP="X" P="1" N="result2"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1754" N="JavaScript-ServiceDate" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var qualifier = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(0);

{

{

myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;Subscriber_Info&quot;);
myRS.clear();
myRS.insertRow();
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;Subscriber_Info&quot;, myRS, true);
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12704" FP="_AP" N="a"/><CP ID="12705" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="12703" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1760" N="JavaScript-Record Set-Subscriber Information_2000B for patient" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{df450e4e-e4da-45d3-a02c-cf9fcffb29f5}">Record set for subscriber info
</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">// Retrieving the record set or creating the recordset
myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;Subscriber_InfoforPAT&quot;);
// Creating an empty array and Getting the value by index and assigning it to the array.Updating the newly inserted row with the values from the array
var resArr = new Array();
for (var i = 0; i &lt; 5; i++)
{
resArr [i] = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i);
}
myRS.insertRow();
myRS.updateRow(resArr);
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;Subscriber_InfoforPAT&quot;, myRS, true);</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12716" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12717" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12718" FP="A" P="2" N="value3"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12719" FP="A" P="3" N="value4"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12720" FP="A" P="4" N="value5"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12715" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1761" T="SetValue"><CPs><CP ID="12733" FP="A" N="v" DirectValue="1"/><CP ID="12732" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1762" T="ChangeVariable"><Ps C="S"><P N="variableID">169</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12737" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1765" N="Set Value-2000B" T="SetValue"><CPs><CP ID="12743" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12744" FP="A" N="v" DirectValue="{169}"/><CP ID="12742" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1766" N="Set Value-2000C" T="SetValue"><CPs><CP ID="12747" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12748" FP="A" N="v" DirectValue="{169}"/><CP ID="12746" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1767" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var lastname = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(0);

// selecting the last record in the record set
myRS.last();
// Get the current row number
var RS1 = myRS.getRow();
// Start a loop that iterates while RS1 (current row) is greater than 0
var amt_2430 = 0;
while (RS1&gt;0)
{
Fields = myRS.getFields();
myRS2 = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;Service_2430Details&quot;);
myRS2.last();
var RS2 = myRS2.getRow();
while (RS2&gt;0)
{
Fields2 = myRS2.getFields();
if(Fields2[3] != &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; Fields2[3] != undefined)
{
amt_2430 = parseFloat(amt_2430)+parseFloat(Fields2[3]);
//ec_ResultHelper.println(&quot;x=&quot; +Fields2[3]);

}

}

amt_2430=0;
myRS.previous();
RS1 = myRS.getRow();
}

DirectValue="1"/><CP ID="12901" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1805" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">// Get the value at index 0
var countrycode = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(0);
// Check if countrycode is an empty string
if(countrycode ==&quot;&quot;)
{
// Report &quot;US&quot; as the country code at index 0
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,&quot;US&quot;);//CountryCode
ec_ResultHelper.Send(); // Send the result
}
else
{
// Report the retrieved country code at index 0
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,countrycode);//CountryCode
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
}
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12913" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="12914" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1808" N="2000B_2430" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">monetaryAmount = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;SVD02_2430_MonetaryAmt_2000B&quot;);
monetarySumAmount = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;SVD02_2430_MonetarySumAmt_2000B&quot;);
if (monetarySumAmount == &quot;&quot;) {
monetarySumAmount = 0;
}
if (monetaryAmount != &quot;&quot;) {
var total = parseFloat(monetaryAmount) + parseFloat(monetarySumAmount);
// Check if original monetaryAmount string contains a decimal point
if (monetaryAmount.indexOf('.') !== -1) {
// Input had decimals, so format total with two decimals
var formattedTotal = total.toFixed(2);
} else {
// Input had no decimals, format total as integer
var formattedTotal = total.toFixed(0);
}
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, formattedTotal);
}
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12932" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12933" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="12931" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1810" T="ChangeVariable"><Ps C="S"><P N="variableID">180</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12935" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1812" T="ChangeVariable"><Ps C="S"><P N="variableID">180</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12938" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12937" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1814" T="ChangeVariable"><Ps C="S"><P N="variableID">173</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12941" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12940" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1816" T="ChangeVariable"><Ps C="S"><P N="variableID">182</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12943" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1817" N="AMT_2430_2000B" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">amt02_2430_2000B = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;RPL_AMT_02_2000B&quot;);
sumAmt02_2430_2000B = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;RPL_SumAmt_02_2000B&quot;);
if (sumAmt02_2430_2000B == &quot;&quot;) {
sumAmt02_2430_2000B = 0;
}
if (amt02_2430_2000B != &quot;&quot;) {
var total = parseFloat(amt02_2430_2000B) + parseFloat(sumAmt02_2430_2000B);
// Check if original amt02_2430_2000B string contains a decimal point
if (amt02_2430_2000B.indexOf('.') !== -1) {
// Input had decimals, so format total with two decimals
var formattedTotal = total.toFixed(2);
} else {
// Input had no decimals, format total as integer (no decimals)
var formattedTotal = total.toFixed(0);
}
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, formattedTotal);
}

monetarySumAmount = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;SVD02_2430_MonetarySumAmt_2000C&quot;);
if (monetarySumAmount == &quot;&quot;) {
monetarySumAmount = 0;
}
if (monetaryAmount != &quot;&quot;) {
var total = parseFloat(monetaryAmount) + parseFloat(monetarySumAmount);
// Check if original monetaryAmount string contains decimal point
if (monetaryAmount.indexOf('.') !== -1) {
// Input had decimals, so keep two decimals in output
var formattedTotal = total.toFixed(2);
} else {
// Input had no decimals, output integer without decimals
var formattedTotal = total.toFixed(0);
}
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, formattedTotal);
}
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12956" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12957" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="12955" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1826" T="ChangeVariable"><Ps C="S"><P N="variableID">184</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12959" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1830" T="ChangeVariable"><Ps C="S"><P N="variableID">184</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12964" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12963" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1831" N="AMT_2430_2000C" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">amt02_2430_2000C = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;RPL_AMT_02_2000C&quot;);
sumAmt02_2430_2000C = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;RPL_SumAmt_02_2000C&quot;);
if (sumAmt02_2430_2000C == &quot;&quot;) {
sumAmt02_2430_2000C = 0;
}
if (amt02_2430_2000C != &quot;&quot;) {
var total = parseFloat(amt02_2430_2000C) + parseFloat(sumAmt02_2430_2000C);
// Check if original amt02_2430_2000C string contains a decimal point
if (amt02_2430_2000C.indexOf('.') !== -1) {
// Input had decimals, so format total with two decimals
var formattedTotal = total.toFixed(2);
} else {
// Input had no decimals, format total as integer (no decimals)
var formattedTotal = total.toFixed(0);
}
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, formattedTotal);
}

<file path="ArtifactsRepository/Claims/IBEncounterCommon/Groovy/IB_837_Encounter_ISA_Split.txt">
import org.apache.commons.lang.StringUtils
import com.edifecs.etools.xeserver.proxy.ProxyMessage
exchange = context.exchange;
exchProperties = exchange.properties;
messages = exchange.messages
message = messages[0]
msgHeaders = message.headers
// Copy exchange properties to message headers
exchProperties.each { k, v -> msgHeaders.put(k, v) }
// Retrieve the base filename and extension from input properties
def baseFileName = exchProperties.get('FileNameNoExt')  // Get the base filename without extension
def extension = exchProperties.get('extension')  // Get the file extension
// Read the input content as a String
messageBodyInputStream = message.getBodyAsSmartStream().getInputStream();
String inputContent = new String(messageBodyInputStream.readAllBytes());
// Replace all occurrences of ~ with \r\n (to format the unstructured file)
inputContent = inputContent.replace('~', '\r\n')
// Split the content into lines
def lines = inputContent.split('\n')
// Count the occurrences of CLM* segments
def clmCount = lines.count { it.startsWith("CLM*") }
// Set the clmCount in the properties as test
msgHeaders.put("TotalEdiTransaction", clmCount.toString())
// Find all the ISA* lines and split accordingly
def isaSegments = []
def currentISA = []
def isISAFound = false
// Process each line to identify ISA* and corresponding blocks
lines.each { line ->
if (line.startsWith("ISA*")) {
// If an ISA* is found, process the current block (if any)
if (isISAFound) {
isaSegments << currentISA.join('\n')  // Add the current block to the ISA segments list
}
currentISA = [line]  // Start a new block with the current ISA line
isISAFound = true
} else {
currentISA << line  // Add the line to the current block
}
}
// Add the last ISA* block
if (isISAFound) {
isaSegments << currentISA.join('\n')
}
// Check the number of ISA segments and decide whether to split the file or not
if (isaSegments.size() > 1) {
// If there are multiple ISA* segments, perform the split logic
isaSegments.eachWithIndex { segment, index ->
def finalFileName
def finalFileNameNoExt
if (isaSegments.size() > 1) {
// If there are multiple ISA* segments, append a counter
finalFileName = baseFileName + "_" + (index + 1) + "." + extension
finalFileNameNoExt = baseFileName + "_" + (index + 1)
} else {
// If there is only one ISA* segment, no counter is needed
finalFileName = baseFileName + "." + extension
finalFileNameNoExt = baseFileName + "_" + (index + 1)
}
// Set the final filename in the response properties
properties.put("SplitISAFileName", finalFileName)
msgHeaders.put("MultipleCheckISA", "Yes")
properties.put("SplitISAFileNameWithoutExt", finalFileNameNoExt)
// Prepare headers for the new message
def newMsgHeaders = [:]  // Initialize a new map for the headers
exchProperties.each { k, v -> newMsgHeaders.put(k, v) }  // Populate the new message headers with existing exchange properties
// Create a new message using context.createNewMessage
ProxyMessage newMessage = context.createNewMessage(segment, newMsgHeaders)
// Set the SplitISAFileName header
newMessage.setHeader("SplitISAFileName", finalFileName)
newMessage.setHeader("SplitISAFileNameWithoutExt", finalFileNameNoExt)
// Send the response with the split content
context.createExchangeResponse(msgHeaders, newMessage)
}
} else {
// If there's only one ISA* segment, just send the original file as it is
def finalFileName = baseFileName + "." + extension
// Ensure the finalFileName is added to properties
properties.put("SplitISAFileNameWithoutExt", baseFileName)
msgHeaders.put("MultipleCheckISA", "No")
msgHeaders.put("SplitISAFileName", finalFileName)
// Send the original file without any modification
context.createExchangeResponse(msgHeaders, message)
}
</file>

{

}
//Updating the newly inserted row with the values from the array

ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;HealthcareCode_2000B&quot;, myRS1, true);
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="260" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="262" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="263" FP="A" P="2" N="value3"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="261" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="63" N="JavaScript_Output_HI_Patient's Reason for Visit" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;HealthcareCode_2000B&quot;);

// Add a dot after the 3rd character if length is more than 3
for(var i=0;i&lt;Fields.length;i++)
{
if (Fields[i].length &gt; 3) {
healthCareCode = Fields[i].slice(0, 3) + '.' + Fields[i].slice(3);
}
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(i,healthCareCode);
}
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="271" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="267" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="268" FP="X" P="0" N="HI01.02"/><CP ID="269" FP="X" P="1" N="HI02.02"/><CP ID="270" FP="X" P="2" N="HI03.02"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="65" N="JavaScript_Output_HI_Patient's Reason for Visit" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;HealthcareCode_2000C&quot;);

{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(i, Fields[i]);
}
}
}

// Creating an empty array and Getting the value by index and assigning it to the array.

for(i=0;i&lt;24;i++)
{

}
//Updating the newly inserted row with the values from the array

myRS1.updateRow(resArr1);
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;OtherProcedureInfo_2000B&quot;, myRS1, true);

N="Parameters/ec_Script">var myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;OtherProcedureInfo_2000B&quot;);
var Fields = myRS.getFields(); // Retrieve the fields inside the recordSet
for (var i = 0; i &lt; Fields.length; i++) {
if (i % 2 === 0) {
// Even index: Occurance Code
if(Fields[i]!=&quot;&quot;)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(i, Fields[i]);
} else {
// Odd index-Ocuurance Date: Format date from CCYYMMDD to YYYY-MM-DD
var dateStr = Fields[i];
var formattedDate = dateStr.slice(0, 4) + '-' + dateStr.slice(4, 6) + '-' + dateStr.slice(6);
if(formattedDate!=&quot;&quot;)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(i, formattedDate);
}
}

N="value24"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="1289" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="105" N="JavaScript-Output_Occuranace Span Information" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;OccuranceSpanInfo_2000B&quot;);
var Fields = myRS.getFields(); // Retrieve the fields inside the recordSet
var outputIndex = 0;
for (var i = 0; i &lt; Fields.length; i += 2) {
// i: Industry Code
if( Fields[i] !=&quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(outputIndex++, Fields[i]);
}
// i + 1: Date range string in CCYYMMDD-CCYYMMDD
var dateStr = Fields[i + 1];
if( dateStr!=&quot;&quot;)
{
var startDate = dateStr.slice(0, 4) + '-' + dateStr.slice(4, 6) + '-' + dateStr.slice(6, 8); //startDate
var endDate   = dateStr.slice(9, 13) + '-' + dateStr.slice(13, 15) + '-' + dateStr.slice(15, 17);//endDate
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(outputIndex++, startDate);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(outputIndex++, endDate);
}
}
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="1400" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="1401" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="1376" FP="X" P="0" N="HI01.02"/><CP ID="1377" FP="X" P="1" N="value24"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="1476" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="109" N="JavaScript-Output_Occuranace Span Information" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;OccuranceSpanInfo_2000C&quot;);
var Fields = myRS.getFields(); // Retrieve the fields inside the recordSet
var outputIndex = 0;
for (var i = 0; i &lt; Fields.length; i += 2) {
// i: Industry Code
if( Fields[i]!=&quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(outputIndex++, Fields[i]);
}
// i + 1: Date range string in CCYYMMDD-CCYYMMDD
var dateStr = Fields[i + 1];
if(dateStr!=&quot;&quot;)
{
var startDate = dateStr.slice(0, 4) + '-' + dateStr.slice(4, 6) + '-' + dateStr.slice(6, 8); //startDate
var endDate   = dateStr.slice(9, 13) + '-' + dateStr.slice(13, 15) + '-' + dateStr.slice(15, 17);//endDate
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(outputIndex++, startDate);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(outputIndex++, endDate);
}
}
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="1602" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="1603" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="1566" FP="X" P="0" N="HI01.02"/><CP ID="1567" FP="X" P="1" N="HI01.04-StartDate"/><CP ID="1568" FP="X" P="2" N="HI01.04-EndtDate"/><CP ID="1569" FP="X" P="3" N="HI02.02"/><CP ID="1570" FP="X" P="4" N="HI02.04-StartDate"/><CP ID="1571" FP="X" P="5" N="HI02.04-EndtDate"/><CP ID="1572" FP="X" P="6" N="HI03.02"/><CP ID="1573" FP="X" P="7" N="HI03.04-StarttDate"/><CP ID="1574" FP="X" P="8" N="HI03.04-EndtDate"/><CP ID="1575" FP="X" P="9" N="HI04.02"/><CP ID="1576" FP="X" P="10" N="HI04.04-StarttDate"/><CP ID="1577" FP="X" P="11" N="HI04.04-EndtDate"/><CP ID="1578" FP="X" P="12" N="HI05.02"/><CP ID="1579" FP="X" P="13" N="HI05.04-StarttDate"/><CP ID="1580" FP="X" P="14" N="HI05.04-EndtDate"/><CP ID="1581" FP="X" P="15" N="HI06.02"/><CP ID="1582" FP="X" P="16" N="HI06.04-StarttDate"/><CP ID="1583" FP="X" P="17" N="HI06.04-EndtDate"/><CP ID="1584" FP="X" P="18" N="HI07.02"/><CP ID="1585" FP="X" P="19" N="HI07.04-StartDate"/><CP ID="1586" FP="X" P="20" N="HI07.04-EndDate"/><CP ID="1587" FP="X" P="21" N="HI08.02"/><CP ID="1588" FP="X" P="22" N="HI08.04-StartDate"/><CP ID="1589" FP="X" P="23" N="HI08.04-EndtDate"/><CP ID="1590" FP="X" P="24" N="HI09.02"/><CP ID="1591" FP="X" P="25" N="HI09.04-StartDate"/><CP ID="1592" FP="X" P="26" N="HI09.04-EndDate"/><CP ID="1593" FP="X" P="27" N="HI10.02"/><CP ID="1594" FP="X" P="28" N="HI10.04-StartDate"/><CP ID="1595" FP="X" P="29" N="HI10.04-EndDate"/><CP ID="1596" FP="X" P="30" N="HI11.02"/><CP ID="1597" FP="X" P="31" N="HI11.04-StartDate"/><CP ID="1598" FP="X" P="32" N="HI11.04-EndDate"/><CP ID="1599" FP="X" P="33" N="HI12.02"/><CP ID="1600" FP="X" P="34" N="HI12.04-StartDate"/><CP ID="1601" FP="X" P="35" N="HI12.04-EndDate"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="112" N="JavaScript-Input_Occurance Information" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">// Retrieving the record set or creating the recordset

// Creating an empty array and Getting the value by index and assigning it to the array.

for(i=0;i&lt;24;i++)
{

}
//Updating the newly inserted row with the values from the array
myRS1.insertRow();
myRS1.updateRow(resArr1);
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;OccuranceInfo_2000B&quot;, myRS1, true);

N="Parameters/ec_Script">var myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;OccuranceInfo_2000B&quot;);
var Fields = myRS.getFields(); // Retrieve the fields inside the recordSet
for (var i = 0; i &lt; Fields.length; i++) {
if (i % 2 === 0) {
// Even index: Occurance Code
if(Fields[i]!=&quot;&quot;)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(i, Fields[i]);
} else {
// Odd index-Ocuurance Date: Format date from CCYYMMDD to YYYY-MM-DD
var dateStr = Fields[i];
var formattedDate = dateStr.slice(0, 4) + '-' + dateStr.slice(4, 6) + '-' + dateStr.slice(6);
if(dateStr!=&quot;&quot;)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(i, formattedDate);
}
}

N="Parameters/ec_Script">var myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;ValueInfo_2000C&quot;);

{

</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="2376" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2379" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2381" FP="A" P="2" N="value3"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2399" FP="A" P="3" N="value4"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2401" FP="A" P="4" N="value5"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2377" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="132" N="JavaScript_Rendering Provider(2000B)" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">// Retrieving the record set or creating the recordset

myRS1 = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;AttendingProvider_2000B&quot;);
myRS2 = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;RenderingProvider_2000B&quot;);
// Retrieving fields from record sets
Fields1 = myRS1.getFields();
Fields2 = myRS2.getFields();
// Checking if 2420C is not empty
if (Fields2[0] != &quot;&quot;) //for missed mandatory info
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, Fields2[0]);
var FullName = (Fields2[2] + &quot; &quot; + Fields2[1] + &quot; &quot; +Fields2[3]).trim().replace(/\s+/g, ' ');//concatenating firstName+middleName+lastName
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1, FullName);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2, Fields2[4]);
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
}
// Checking if 2420C is empty and 2310A is not empty
else if(Fields2[0] == &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; Fields1[0] != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, Fields1[0]);
var FullName = (Fields1[2] + &quot; &quot; + Fields1[1] + &quot; &quot; +Fields1[3]).trim().replace(/\s+/g, ' ');//concatenating firstName+middleName+lastName
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1, FullName);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2, Fields1[4]);
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
}

C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">// Retrieving the record set or creating the recordset
myRS1 = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;ServiceDate_2400_2000B&quot;);
// Creating an empty array and Getting the value by index and assigning it to the array.
resArr1 = new Array();

{

}
//Updating the newly inserted row with the values from the array
myRS1.insertRow();
myRS1.updateRow(resArr1);
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;ServiceDate_2400_2000B&quot;, myRS1, true);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,&quot;ServiceDate_2400_2000B&quot;);</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="2536" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2537" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2535" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="146" N="JavaScript_Output_ServiceDate" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">// Retrieving record sets or creating recorset
myRS1 = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;ServiceDate_2400_2000B&quot;);
Fields1 = myRS1.getFields();
var qualifier= Fields1[0];
var date= Fields1[1];
if(qualifier == &quot;RD8&quot;) //if qualifier is RD8
{
var firstDateString = date.substring(0, 8);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,firstDateString);
var secondDateString = date.substring(9);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,secondDateString);
}
else if(qualifier == &quot;D8&quot;)//if qualifier is D8
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,date);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,date);
}
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="2542" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2543" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="2540" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/><CP ID="2541" FP="X" P="1" N="result2"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="147" T="ConvertDateTime"><Ps C="S"><P N="in_format">CCYYMMDD</P><P N="in_format_spec">1</P><P N="out_format">yyyy-MM-dd</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="2545" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2544" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="148" T="ConvertDateTime"><Ps C="S"><P N="in_format">CCYYMMDD</P><P N="in_format_spec">1</P><P N="out_format">yyyy-MM-dd</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="2547" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2546" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="150" N="JavaScript_Input_ServiceDate" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">// Retrieving the record set or creating the recordset

T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var ST02 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;TransactionSetControlNum&quot;);
var BHT03 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;BHT03_RefIdentification&quot;);
var BHT04 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;BHT04_CleanClaimDate&quot;);
var ClaimSource = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;ClaimSource&quot;);
var ClaimDeliveryType = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;ClaimDeliveryType&quot;);
var BenefitPlanType = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;BenefitPlanType&quot;);
if(ST02 !=&quot;&quot;)// Checking if ST02 is not empty
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,ST02);
}
if(BHT03 !=&quot;&quot;)// Checking if BHT03 is not empty
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,BHT03);
}
if(BHT04 !=&quot;&quot;)// Checking if BHT04 is not empty
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2,BHT04);
}
if(ClaimDeliveryType != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(3,ClaimDeliveryType);
}
if(ClaimSource != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(4,ClaimSource);
}
if(BenefitPlanType != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(5,BenefitPlanType);
}

var NM103 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;NM103_LastName&quot;);
var NM104 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;NM104_FirstName&quot;);
var NM105 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;NM105_MiddleName&quot;);
var NM109 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;NM109_IdentificationCode&quot;);
if (NM102 === &quot;1&quot;) {
var FullName = (NM104 + &quot; &quot; + NM105 + &quot; &quot; + NM103).trim().replace(/\s+/g, ' ');
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, FullName);
} else if(NM102 === &quot;2&quot;){
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, NM103);
}
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,NM109);

</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">// Retrieving the record set or creating the recordset

</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="481" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="482" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="483" FP="A" P="2" N="value3"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="742" FP="A" P="3" N="value4"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="743" FP="A" P="4" N="value5"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="480" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="96" N="JavaScript- RenderingProviderOutput" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{4f3b125a-5230-4b90-95bf-80e2cd4805b8}">maping done for Rendering Provider only in 2000B Loop</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">// Retrieving record sets or creating recorset
myRS1 = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;Rendering_Prov_2310B_2000B&quot;);
myRS2 = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;Rendering_Prov_2420A_2000B&quot;);
// Retrieving fields from record sets
Fields1 = myRS1.getFields();
Fields2 = myRS2.getFields();
// Checking if 2420A is not empty
if (Fields2[0] != &quot;&quot;) //for missed mandatory info
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, Fields2[0]);
var FullName = (Fields2[3] + &quot; &quot; + Fields2[4] + &quot; &quot; +Fields2[1]).trim().replace(/\s+/g, ' ');//concatenating firstName+middleName+lastName
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1, FullName);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2, Fields2[2]);
//ec_ResultHelper.Send();
}
// Checking if 2420A is empty and 2310B is not empty
else if(Fields2[0] == &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; Fields1[0] != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, Fields1[0]);
var FullName = (Fields1[3] + &quot; &quot; + Fields1[4] + &quot; &quot; +Fields1[1]).trim().replace(/\s+/g, ' ');//concatenating firstName+middleName+lastName
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1, FullName);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2, Fields1[2]);
//ec_ResultHelper.Send();
}
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="500" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="501" FP="A" P="0" N="no input"/><CP ID="492" FP="X" P="0" N="NM101"/><CP ID="493" FP="X" P="1" N="NM103"/><CP ID="494" FP="X" P="2" N="NM109"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="109" N="JavaScript_Input_2400_DiagnosisPointer" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">// Retrieving the record set or creating the recordset
myRS1 = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;DiagnosisCodePointer_2400_2000B&quot;);
// Creating an empty array and Getting the value by index and assigning it to the array.
resArr1 = new Array();
for(i=0;i&lt;4;i++)
{
resArr1[i] = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i);
}
//Updating the newly inserted row with the values from the array
myRS1.insertRow();
myRS1.updateRow(resArr1);
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;DiagnosisCodePointer_2400_2000B&quot;, myRS1, true);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,&quot;DiagnosisCodePointer_2400_2000B&quot;);</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="588" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="616" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="617" FP="A" P="2" N="value3"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="618" FP="A" P="3" N="value4"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="589" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="110" N="JavaScript_2310_DiagnosisCode" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">// Retrieving the record set or creating the recordset
myRS1 = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;DiagnosisCode_2310_2000B&quot;);
// Creating an empty array and Getting the value by index and assigning it to the array.
resArr1 = new Array();
for(i=0;i&lt;12;i++)
{
resArr1[i] = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i);
}
//Updating the newly inserted row with the values from the array
myRS1.insertRow();
myRS1.updateRow(resArr1);
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;DiagnosisCode_2310_2000B&quot;, myRS1, true);
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="591" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="593" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="594" FP="A" P="2" N="value3"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="595" FP="A" P="3" N="value4"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="596" FP="A" P="4" N="value5"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="597" FP="A" P="5" N="value6"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="598" FP="A" P="6" N="value7"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="599" FP="A" P="7" N="value8"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="600" FP="A" P="8" N="value9"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="601" FP="A" P="9" N="value10"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="602" FP="A" P="10" N="value11"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="603" FP="A" P="11" N="value12"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="592" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="111" N="JavaScript_Output_2400_DiagnosisPointer" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">// Retrieve record sets
var myRS1 = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;DiagnosisCode_2310_2000B&quot;); // diagnosis codes RecordSet
var myRS2 = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;DiagnosisCodePointer_2400_2000B&quot;); // diagnosis code pointer RecordSet
// retrieve diagnosis codes
var diagnosisCodes = myRS1.getFields(); // retrieve the fields
// Get pointer fields from myRS2
var codePointers = myRS2.getFields();
// Loop through each pointer and map it to the diagnosis code
for (var i = 0; i &lt; codePointers.length; i++) {
var pointer = parseInt(codePointers[i]);  // Convert pointer string to number
// Check if the pointer is within valid range (1 to number of diagnosis codes)
if (!isNaN(pointer) &amp;&amp; pointer &gt;= 1 &amp;&amp; pointer &lt;= diagnosisCodes.length) {
var code = diagnosisCodes[pointer - 1];  // Pointers are 1-based, arrays are 0-based
// Format code with '.' after 3rd character if length &gt; 3
if (code.length &gt; 3) {
code = code.slice(0, 3) + '.' + code.slice(3);
}
// Output the result at the same index
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(i, code);
}
}
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="625" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="622" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="623" FP="X" P="0" N="S707.01"/><CP ID="711" FP="X" P="1" N="S707.02"/><CP ID="712" FP="X" P="2" N="S707.03"/><CP ID="713" FP="X" P="3" N="S707.04"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="112" N="JavaScript_Input_ServiceDate" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">// Retrieving the record set or creating the recordset
myRS1 = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;ServiceDate_2400_2000B&quot;);
// Creating an empty array and Getting the value by index and assigning it to the array.
resArr1 = new Array();
for(i=0;i&lt;2;i++)
{
resArr1[i] = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i);
}
//Updating the newly inserted row with the values from the array
myRS1.insertRow();
myRS1.updateRow(resArr1);
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;ServiceDate_2400_2000B&quot;, myRS1, true);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,&quot;ServiceDate_2400_2000B&quot;);</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="629" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="631" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="628" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="113" N="JavaScript_Output_ServiceDate" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">// Retrieving record sets or creating recorset
myRS1 = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;ServiceDate_2400_2000B&quot;);
Fields1 = myRS1.getFields();
var qualifier= Fields1[0];
var date= Fields1[1];
if(qualifier == &quot;RD8&quot;)
{
var firstDateString = date.substring(0, 8);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,firstDateString);
var secondDateString = date.substring(9);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,secondDateString);
}
else if(qualifier == &quot;D8&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,date);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,date);
}
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="637" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="634" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="635" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/><CP ID="636" FP="X" P="1" N="result2"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="114" T="ConvertDateTime"><Ps C="S"><P N="in_format">CCYYMMDD</P><P N="in_format_spec">1</P><P N="out_format">yyyy-MM-dd</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="639" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="638" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="115" T="ConvertDateTime"><Ps C="S"><P N="in_format">CCYYMMDD</P><P N="in_format_spec">1</P><P N="out_format">yyyy-MM-dd</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="641" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="640" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="123" N="JavaScript-Input_DrugIdentification" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">// Retrieving the record set or creating the recordset

// Creating an empty array and Getting the value by index and assigning it to the array.

for(i=0;i&lt;3;i++)
{
resArr1[i] = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i);
}
//Updating the newly inserted row with the values from the array
myRS1.insertRow();
myRS1.updateRow(resArr1);
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;DrugIdentification_2410_2000B&quot;, myRS1, true);
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="723" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="725" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="726" FP="A" P="2" N="value3"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="724" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="124" N="JavaScript-Output_DrugIdentification" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">// Retrieving record sets or creating recorset

{

{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(i,Fields[i]);
}
}
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="734" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="730" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="731" FP="X" P="0" N="LIN03"/><CP ID="732" FP="X" P="1" N="CTP04"/><CP ID="733" FP="X" P="2" N="CTP05.01"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="126" N="JavaScript- RenderingProvider_2310B-2000B" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{4f3b125a-5230-4b90-95bf-80e2cd4805b8}">Record set for 2310B loop.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">// Retrieving the record set or creating the recordset

{

}
myRS.insertRow();

</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="753" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="754" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="755" FP="A" P="2" N="value3"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="756" FP="A" P="3" N="value4"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="757" FP="A" P="4" N="value5"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="752" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="128" N="JavaScript- RenderingProviderOutput" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{4f3b125a-5230-4b90-95bf-80e2cd4805b8}">maping done for Rendering Provider only in 2000B Loop</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">// Retrieving record sets or creating recorset

myRS1.updateRow(resArr1);
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;DrugIdentification_2410_2000B&quot;, myRS1, true);

{
"inbound": {
#if($RecordID != "" and $RecordID != "(N/A)" and $RecordID != "{Prp[RecordID]}" and $RecordID != "null" and ${FileErrorFlag} == "No")
"recordIdentifier": "${RecordID}",
#{else}#end
#if($RecordID != "" and $RecordID != "(N/A)" and $RecordID != "{Prp[RecordID]}" and $RecordID != "null" and ${FileErrorFlag} == "No")
"recordIdentifierFromSource": "${RecordID}",
#{else}#end
#if($RecordIdentifier != "" and $RecordIdentifier != "(N/A)" and $RecordIdentifier != "{Prp[RecordIdentifier]}" and $RecordIdentifier != "null" and ${FileErrorFlag} == "Yes")
"recordIdentifier": "${RecordIdentifier}",
#{else}#end
#if($sourceTypeIdentifier != "" and $sourceTypeIdentifier != "(N/A)" and $sourceTypeIdentifier != "{Prp[sourceTypeIdentifier]}" and $sourceTypeIdentifier != "null" and ${FileErrorFlag} == "No")
"sourceTypeIdentifier": "${sourceTypeIdentifier}",
#{else}#end
#if($sourceTypeIdentifier != "" and $sourceTypeIdentifier != "(N/A)" and $sourceTypeIdentifier != "{Prp[sourceTypeIdentifier]}" and $sourceTypeIdentifier != "null" and ${FileErrorFlag} == "Yes")
"sourceTypeIdentifier": "${SourceTypeIdentifier}",
#{else}#end
#if($inputFileType != "" and $inputFileType != "(N/A)" and $inputFileType != "{Prp[inputFileType]}" and $inputFileType != "null")
"claimTransactionType": "${inputFileType}",
#{else}#end
#if($TotalXMLTransactionCount != "" and $TotalXMLTransactionCount != "(N/A)" and $TotalXMLTransactionCount != "{Prp[TotalXMLTransactionCount]}" and $TotalXMLTransactionCount != "null" and $TimeFlag == "YES" and $Flag == "YES")
"totalXMLTransactionCount": "${TotalXMLTransactionCount}",
#{else}#end

"inputFileId": "${InputFileId}",
#{else}#end
#if($FileNameExt != "" and $FileNameExt != "(N/A)" and $FileNameExt != "{Prp[FileNameExt]}" and $FileNameExt != "null" and ${FileErrorFlag} == "No")
"inputFilename": "${FileNameExt}",
#{else}#end

"inputFilename": "${FileNameExt}",
#{else}#end
#if($inputFileType != "" and $inputFileType != "(N/A)" and $inputFileType != "{Prp[inputFileType]}" and $inputFileType != "null")
"inputFileType": "${inputFileType}",
#{else}#end
#if(${FileErrorFlag} == "Yes")
"inputFileType": "N/A"
#{else}#end
#if($totalClaimCount != "" and $totalClaimCount != "(N/A)" and $totalClaimCount != "{Prp[totalClaimCount]}" and $totalClaimCount != "null")
"totalInputTransaction": "${totalClaimCount}",
#{else}#end
#if($totalClaimCount != "" and $totalClaimCount != "(N/A)" and $totalClaimCount != "{Prp[totalClaimCount]}" and $totalClaimCount != "null" and $TimeFlag == "NO" and $Flag == "NO")
"totalClaimCount": "${totalClaimCount}"
#{else}#end
#if($totalClaimCount != "" and $totalClaimCount != "(N/A)" and $totalClaimCount != "{Prp[totalClaimCount]}" and $totalClaimCount != "null" and $TimeFlag == "YES" and $Flag == "YES")
"totalClaimCount": "${totalClaimCount}"
#{else}#end
},
#if($HCC_ClaimID != "" and $HCC_ClaimID != "(N/A)" and $HCC_ClaimID != "{Prp[HCC_ClaimID]}" and $HCC_ClaimID != "null" and ${FileErrorFlag}!= "Yes")
"loadToHRP": {
"claimIdHRP": "${HCC_ClaimID}"
},
#{else}#end
"businessAdaptor": {
#if($FileNameExtArchive != "" and $FileNameExtArchive != "(N/A)" and $FileNameExtArchive != "{Prp[FileNameExtArchive]}" and $FileNameExtArchive != "null")
"inputArchiveFilename": "${FileNameExtArchive}",
#{else}#end
#if($ArchiveFilename != "" and $ArchiveFilename != "(N/A)" and $ArchiveFilename != "{Prp[ArchiveFilename]}" and $ArchiveFilename != "null" and $TimeFlag == "YES" and $Flag == "YES")
"recordArchiveFilename": "${ArchiveFilename}",
#{else}#end
#if($FileReceiptDateTime != "" and $FileReceiptDateTime != "(N/A)" and $FileReceiptDateTime != "{Prp[FileReceiptDateTime]}" and $FileReceiptDateTime != "null")
"inputFileReceiptDateTime": "${FileReceiptDateTime}",
#{else}#end
#if($AuditTime != "" and $AuditTime != "(N/A)" and $AuditTime != "{Prp[AuditTime]}" and $AuditTime != "null" and $TimeFlag == "NO" and $Flag == "NO")
"adaptorReceiptDateTime": "${AuditTime}",
#{else}#end
#if($XMLAuditTime != "" and $XMLAuditTime != "(N/A)" and $XMLAuditTime != "{Prp[XMLAuditTime]}" and $XMLAuditTime != "null" and $TimeFlag == "YES" and $Flag == "YES")
"adaptorReceiptDateTime": "${XMLAuditTime}",
#{else}#end
#if($AuditDateTime != "" and $AuditDateTime != "(N/A)" and $AuditDateTime != "{Prp[AuditDateTime]}" and $AuditDateTime != "null")
"adaptorAuditDateTime": "${AuditDateTime}"
#{else}#end
},
"processStatus": {
#if($ProcessStageName != "" and $ProcessStageName != "(N/A)" and $ProcessStageName != "{Prp[ProcessStageName]}" and $ProcessStageName != "null" and $Flag == "NO")
"processStageName": "${ProcessStageName}",
#{else}#end
#if($ProcessStageName != "" and $ProcessStageName != "(N/A)" and $ProcessStageName != "{Prp[ProcessStageName]}" and $ProcessStageName != "null" and $Flag == "YES")
"processStageName" : "${ProcessStageName}",
#{else}#end
#if($ProcessStageName != "" and $ProcessStageName != "(N/A)" and $ProcessStageName != "{Prp[ProcessStageName]}" and $ProcessStageName != "null" and ${FileErrorFlag} == "Yes")
"processStageName" : "${ProcessStageName}",
#{else}#end
#if($AdaptorStatus != "" and $AdaptorStatus != "(N/A)" and $AdaptorStatus != "{Prp[adaptorStatus]}" and $AdaptorStatus != "null" and ${FileErrorFlag} == "Yes")
"adaptorStatus": "${AdaptorStatus}",
#{else}#end
#if($AdaptorStatus != "" and $AdaptorStatus != "(N/A)" and $AdaptorStatus != "{Prp[adaptorStatus]}" and $AdaptorStatus != "null" and $TimeFlag == "NO" and $Flag == "NO" and $FieldFlag =="NO")
"adaptorStatus": "${AdaptorStatus}",
#{else}#end
#if($AdaptorStatus != "" and $AdaptorStatus != "(N/A)" and $AdaptorStatus != "{Prp[adaptorStatus]}" and $AdaptorStatus != "null" and $TimeFlag == "YES" and $Flag == "YES" )
"adaptorStatus": "${AdaptorStatus}",
#{else}#end
#if($AdaptorStatus != "" and $AdaptorStatus != "(N/A)" and $AdaptorStatus != "{Prp[adaptorStatus]}" and $AdaptorStatus != "null"  and $BadFlag == "YES" and  $TimeFlag == "NO" and $Flag == "NO")
"adaptorStatus": "${AdaptorStatus}",
#{else}#end
#if($AdaptorErrorMessage != "" and $AdaptorErrorMessage != "(N/A)" and $AdaptorErrorMessage != "{Prp[AdaptorErrorMessage]}" and $AdaptorErrorMessage != "null" and $BadFlag == "YES")
"adaptorErrorMessage": "${AdaptorErrorMessage}",
#{else}#end
#if($AdaptorErrorMessage != "" and $AdaptorErrorMessage != "(N/A)" and $AdaptorErrorMessage != "{Prp[AdaptorErrorMessage]}" and $AdaptorErrorMessage != "null" and ${FileErrorFlag} == "Yes" )
"adaptorErrorMessage": "${AdaptorErrorMessage}",
#{else}#end
"CreatedBY":"EDIFECS"
}
}
}
