PricingInfromation RecordSet 2000C" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{788f0976-0bee-4224-92e3-60206d4e4f45}">Creating the variable and storing all the value in the variable,creating array and storing  all the value into the array.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var hcpLoop = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;ServiceLine_2400&quot;);
var allowedAmount = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;HCP02_2400_2000C&quot;);
var pricingMethodology = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;HCP01_2400_2000C&quot;);
var hccClaimNumber = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;LX01_2400_2000C&quot;);
var fixedFormat = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;K3_01_2300_2000C&quot;);
var k3Substring = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;KS_Substr_2300_2000C&quot;);
var description_NTE_01 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;NTE01_2300_2000C&quot;);
var description = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;NTE02_2300_2000C&quot;);
var noteReference = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;NTE01_2400_2000C&quot;);
var description_2400 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;NTE02_2400_2000C&quot;);
var hcpLoopArray = [];
hcpLoopArray[0] = allowedAmount;
hcpLoopArray[1] = pricingMethodology;
hcpLoopArray[2] = hccClaimNumber;
if (noteReference == &quot;TPO&quot; &amp;&amp; noteReference !== &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; description_2400 !== &quot;&quot;) {
hcpLoopArray[3] = noteReference;
hcpLoopArray[4] = description_2400;
} else if (noteReference == &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; description_2400 == &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; fixedFormat !== &quot;&quot;) {
hcpLoopArray[3] = fixedFormat;
hcpLoopArray[4] = k3Substring;
} else if (noteReference == &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; description_2400 == &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; fixedFormat == &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; description_NTE_01 == &quot;ADD&quot; &amp;&amp; description !== &quot;&quot;) {
hcpLoopArray[3] = description_NTE_01;
hcpLoopArray[4] = description;
}
hcpLoop.insertRow();
hcpLoop.updateRow(hcpLoopArray);
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;ServiceLine_2400&quot;, hcpLoop, true);</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="532" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="314" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="315" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"/><CP ID="313" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="79" N="2000C_2400_HCP01" T="ConversionalCopy"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{788f0976-0bee-4224-92e3-60206d4e4f45}">Converting the value 00 meand Not Contracted and 1 to 14 priced.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="in">,00,01,02,03,04,05,06,07,08,09,10,11,12,13,14</P><P N="out">Denied,Not Contracted,Priced,Priced,Priced,Priced,Priced,Priced,Priced,Priced,Priced,Priced,Priced,Priced,Priced,Priced</P><P N="comment">,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="318" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="317" FP="X" N="HCP01"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="80" N="2000C_2400_HC01" T="ConditionalCopy"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{788f0976-0bee-4224-92e3-60206d4e4f45}">Checking the input value null or not ,and send the value.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/arg1">320</P><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/arg1/type">2</P><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/operation">1</P><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/operation/type">0</P><P N="if_1/actions/assignment_1/lvalue">319</P><P N="if_1/actions/assignment_1/lvalue/type">2</P><P N="if_1/actions/assignment_1/rvalue">320</P><P N="if_1/actions/assignment_1/rvalue/type">2</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="320" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="319" FP="X" P="0" N="HCP01"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="83" N="HealthrulesDecisionCode" T="ConditionalCopy"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{788f0976-0bee-4224-92e3-60206d4e4f45}">Checking the input value null or not ,and send the value.
</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/arg1">326</P><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/arg1/type">2</P><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/operation">1</P><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/operation/type">0</P><P N="if_1/actions/assignment_1/lvalue">325</P><P N="if_1/actions/assignment_1/lvalue/type">2</P><P N="if_1/actions/assignment_1/rvalue">326</P><P N="if_1/actions/assignment_1/rvalue/type">2</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="326" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="325" FP="X" P="0" N="HCP01"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="84" N="HealthrulesDecisionCode" T="ConversionalCopy"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{788f0976-0bee-4224-92e3-60206d4e4f45}">Converting the value 00 meand Not Contracted and 1 to 14 priced.
</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="in">,00,01,02,03,04,05,06,07,08,09,10,11,12,13,14</P><P N="out">Denied,Not Contracted,Priced,Priced,Priced,Priced,Priced,Priced,Priced,Priced,Priced,Priced,Priced,Priced,Priced,Priced</P><P N="comment">,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="328" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="327" FP="X" N="HCP01"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="86" N="JavaScript - PricingInfromation RecordSet 2000B" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{788f0976-0bee-4224-92e3-60206d4e4f45}">Creating the variable and storing all the value in the variable,creating array and storing  all the value into the array and passing the reuslt.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var hcpLoop = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;ServiceLine_2400&quot;);
var allowedAmount = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;HCP_02&quot;);
var pricingMethodology = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;HCP_01&quot;);
var hccClaimNumber = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;LX_01&quot;);
var fixedFormat = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;K301_2300_2000B&quot;);
var k3Substring = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;substringK3&quot;);
var description_NTE_01 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;NTE01_2300_2000B&quot;);
var description = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;NTE02_2300_2000B&quot;);
var noteReference = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;NTE01_2400_2000B&quot;);
var description_2400 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;NTE02_2400_2000B&quot;);
var hcpLoopArray = [];
hcpLoopArray[0] = allowedAmount;
hcpLoopArray[1] = pricingMethodology;
hcpLoopArray[2] = hccClaimNumber;
if (noteReference == &quot;TPO&quot; &amp;&amp; noteReference !== &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; description_2400 !== &quot;&quot;) {
hcpLoopArray[3] = noteReference;
hcpLoopArray[4] = description_2400;
} else if (noteReference == &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; description_2400 == &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; fixedFormat !== &quot;&quot;) {
hcpLoopArray[3] = fixedFormat;
hcpLoopArray[4] = k3Substring;
} else if (noteReference == &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; description_2400 == &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; fixedFormat == &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; description_NTE_01 == &quot;ADD&quot; &amp;&amp; description !== &quot;&quot;) {
hcpLoopArray[3] = description_NTE_01;
hcpLoopArray[4] = description;
}
hcpLoop.insertRow();
hcpLoop.updateRow(hcpLoopArray);
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;ServiceLine_2400&quot;, hcpLoop, true);</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="459" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="332" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="333" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"/><CP ID="334" FP="A" P="2" N="value3"/><CP ID="331" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="87" N="2000B_2400_Trigger" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{788f0976-0bee-4224-92e3-60206d4e4f45}">Triggering the result in array using the record set.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">hcp2400LoopFields = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;ServiceLine_2400&quot;);
var repricerName=ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;SenderId&quot;);
var responseDate=ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;BHT04_Date&quot;);
var hcp2400Array = new Array();
var allowedAmount = &quot;&quot;;
var pricingMethodology = &quot;&quot;;
var hccClaimNumber = &quot;&quot;;
var messagecode;
var messagetext;
for (var RS = hcp2400LoopFields.last(); RS &gt; 0; RS = hcp2400LoopFields.previous()) {
hcp2400Array = hcp2400LoopFields.getFields();
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
if (hcp2400Array.length &gt; 0) {
allowedAmount = hcp2400Array[0];
pricingMethodology = hcp2400Array[1];
hccClaimNumber = hcp2400Array[2];
messagecode = hcp2400Array[3];
messagetext = hcp2400Array[4];
if (!pricingMethodology) {
pricingMethodology = &quot;Denied&quot;;
}
//ec_ResultHelper.println(typeof(allowedAmount));
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, Number(allowedAmount).toFixed(2));
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1, pricingMethodology);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2, &quot;HealthRulesMessage&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(3, hccClaimNumber);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(4, repricerName);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(5, responseDate);
if(messagecode!=undefined &amp;&amp; messagetext !=undefined)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(6, messagetext);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(7, messagecode);
}
}
}

N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/operation/type">0</P><P N="if_1/actions/assignment_1/lvalue">18</P><P N="if_1/actions/assignment_1/lvalue/type">2</P><P N="if_1/actions/assignment_1/rvalue">19</P><P N="if_1/actions/assignment_1/rvalue/type">2</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="19" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="18" FP="X" P="0" N="2400 HCP_01"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="8" N="healthRulesDecisioncode" T="ConversionalCopy"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{f1822352-811a-49d3-8b4a-bfa2f07bc8ab}">Converting the value 00 meand Not Contracted and 1 to 14 priced.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="in">,00,01,02,03,04,05,06,07,08,09,10,11,12,13,14</P><P N="out">Denied,Not Contracted,Priced,Priced,Priced,Priced,Priced,Priced,Priced,Priced,Priced,Priced,Priced,Priced,Priced,Priced</P><P N="comment">,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="26" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="25" FP="X" N="2400 HCP_01"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="10" N="JavaScript - PricingInfromation RecordSet 2000C" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{f1822352-811a-49d3-8b4a-bfa2f07bc8ab}">Creating the variable and storing all the value in the variable,creating array and storing  all the value into the array.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var hcpLoop = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;ServiceLine_2400&quot;);
var allowedAmount = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;HCP02_Pat_AllowedAmount&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.println(&quot;HCP02_Pat_AllowedAmount&quot;);
var pricingMethodology = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;HCP01_Pat_healthRule&quot;);
var hccClaimNumber = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;LX01_Pat_hccclaimNumber&quot;);
var k301_2400 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;K3_Pat_2400_01&quot;);
var k301_2400substring=ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;K3_Pat_2400_01_substring&quot;);
var k301_2300 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;K3_Pat_2300_01&quot;);
var k301_2300substring=ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;K3_Pat_2300_01_substring&quot;);
var nte01_2400=ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;NTE01_Pat_2400&quot;);
var nte02_2400=ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;NTE02_Pat_2400&quot;);
var nte01_2300=ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;NTE01_Pat_2300&quot;);
var nte02_2300=ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;NTE02_Pat_2300&quot;);
var hcpLoopArray = new Array()
hcpLoopArray[0] = allowedAmount;
hcpLoopArray[1] = pricingMethodology;
hcpLoopArray[2] = hccClaimNumber;
//hcpLoopArray[3] = k301;
//hcpLoopArray[4]= k301_2400substring;
//hcpLoopArray[5]= NTE02;
//hcpLoopArray[6]= NTE01;
if (k301_2400 != &quot;&quot;)
{
hcpLoopArray[3] = k301_2400;
hcpLoopArray[4]= k301_2400substring;
}
else if (k301_2400 == &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; nte01_2400 == &quot;TPO&quot; &amp;&amp; nte02_2400 != &quot;&quot;)
{
hcpLoopArray[3] = nte01_2400;
hcpLoopArray[4]= nte02_2400;
}
else if (k301_2400 == &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; nte01_2400 == &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; nte02_2400 == &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; k301_2300 != &quot;&quot;)
{
hcpLoopArray[3] = k301_2300;
hcpLoopArray[4]= k301_2300substring;
}
else if (k301_2400 == &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; nte01_2400 == &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; nte02_2400 == &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; k301_2300 == &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; nte01_2300 == &quot;TPO&quot; &amp;&amp; nte02_2300 != &quot;&quot;)
{
hcpLoopArray[3] = nte01_2300;
hcpLoopArray[4]= nte02_2300;
}
hcpLoop.insertRow();
hcpLoop.updateRow(hcpLoopArray);
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;ServiceLine_2400&quot;, hcpLoop, true);</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="275" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="30" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="29" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="12" N="JavaScript - PricingInfromation RecordSet 2000B" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{f1822352-811a-49d3-8b4a-bfa2f07bc8ab}">Creating the variable and storing all the value in the variable,creating array and storing  all the value into the array and passing the reuslt.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var hcpLoop = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;ServiceLine_2400&quot;);
var allowedAmount = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;HCP02_Sub_AllowedAmount&quot;);
var pricingMethodology = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;HCP01_Sub_healthRule&quot;);
var hccClaimNumber = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;LX01_Sub_hccclaimNumber&quot;);
var k301_2400 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;K3_Sub_2400_01&quot;);
var k301_2400substring=ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;K3_Sub_2400_substring&quot;);
var k301_2300 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;K3_Sub_2300_01&quot;);
var k301_2300substring=ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;K3_Sub_2300_substring&quot;);
var nte01_2400=ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;NTE01_Sub_2400&quot;);
var nte02_2400=ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;NTE02_Sub_2400&quot;);
var nte01_2300=ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;NTE01_Sub_2300&quot;);
var nte02_2300=ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;NTE02_Sub_2300&quot;);
var hcpLoopArray = new Array()
hcpLoopArray[0] = allowedAmount;
hcpLoopArray[1] = pricingMethodology;
hcpLoopArray[2] = hccClaimNumber;
//HCPLoopArray[3] = k301;
//HCPLoopArray[4]= k301_2400substring;
//HCPLoopArray[5]= NTE02;
//HCPLoopArray[6]= NTE01;
if (k301_2400 != &quot;&quot;)
{
hcpLoopArray[3] = k301_2400;
hcpLoopArray[4]= k301_2400substring;
}
else if (k301_2400 == &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; nte01_2400 == &quot;TPO&quot; &amp;&amp; nte02_2400 != &quot;&quot;)
{
hcpLoopArray[3] = nte01_2400;
hcpLoopArray[4]= nte02_2400;
}
else if (k301_2400 == &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; nte01_2400 == &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; nte02_2400 == &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; k301_2300 != &quot;&quot;)
{
hcpLoopArray[3] = k301_2300;
hcpLoopArray[4]= k301_2300substring;
}
else if (k301_2400 == &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; nte01_2400 == &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; nte02_2400 == &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; k301_2300 == &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; nte01_2300 == &quot;TPO&quot; &amp;&amp; nte02_2300 != &quot;&quot;)
{
hcpLoopArray[3] = nte01_2300;
hcpLoopArray[4]= nte02_2300;
}
hcpLoop.insertRow();
hcpLoop.updateRow(hcpLoopArray);
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;ServiceLine_2400&quot;, hcpLoop, true);
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="226" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="40" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="39" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="14" N="healthrulesDecisionCode" T="ConditionalCopy"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{f1822352-811a-49d3-8b4a-bfa2f07bc8ab}">Checking the input value null or not ,and send the value.
</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/arg1">47</P><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/arg1/type">2</P><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/operation">1</P><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/operation/type">0</P><P N="if_1/actions/assignment_1/lvalue">46</P><P N="if_1/actions/assignment_1/lvalue/type">2</P><P N="if_1/actions/assignment_1/rvalue">47</P><P N="if_1/actions/assignment_1/rvalue/type">2</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="47" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="46" FP="X" P="0" N="2400_HCP01"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="15" N="healthrulesDecisionCode" T="ConversionalCopy"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{f1822352-811a-49d3-8b4a-bfa2f07bc8ab}">Converting the value 00 meand Not Contracted and 1 to 14 priced.
</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="in">,00,01,02,03,04,05,06,07,08,09,10,11,12,13,14</P><P N="out">Denied,Not Contracted,Priced,Priced,Priced,Priced,Priced,Priced,Priced,Priced,Priced,Priced,Priced,Priced,Priced,Priced</P><P N="comment">,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="49" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="48" FP="X" N="2400_HCP01"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="18" N="2000B_2400_Trigger" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{f1822352-811a-49d3-8b4a-bfa2f07bc8ab}">Triggering the result in array using the record set.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">hcp2400LoopFields = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;ServiceLine_2400&quot;);
var repricerName=ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;SenderId&quot;);
var responseDate=ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;BHT04_Date&quot;);
var hcp2400Array = new Array();
var allowedAmount = &quot;&quot;;
var pricingMethodology = &quot;&quot;;
var hccClaimNumber = &quot;&quot;;
var messagecode;
var messagetext;
for (var RS = hcp2400LoopFields.last(); RS &gt; 0; RS = hcp2400LoopFields.previous()) {
hcp2400Array = hcp2400LoopFields.getFields();
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
if (hcp2400Array.length &gt; 0) {
allowedAmount = hcp2400Array[0];
pricingMethodology = hcp2400Array[1];
hccClaimNumber = hcp2400Array[2];
messagecode = hcp2400Array[3];
messagetext = hcp2400Array[4];
if (!pricingMethodology) {
pricingMethodology = &quot;Denied&quot;;
}
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,Number(allowedAmount).toFixed(2));
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1, pricingMethodology);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2, &quot;HealthRulesMessage&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(3, hccClaimNumber);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(4, repricerName);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(5, responseDate);
if(messagecode != undefined &amp;&amp; messagetext != undefined)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(6, messagetext);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(7, messagecode);
}
}
}
hcp2400LoopFields.clear();</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="63" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="64" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="58" FP="X" P="0" N="allowedAmount"/><CP ID="59" FP="X" P="1" N="healthrulesDecisionCode"/><CP ID="61" FP="X" P="2" N="messageCodeType"/><CP ID="62" FP="X" P="3" N="hccClaimNumber"/><CP ID="86" FP="X" P="4" N="repricerName"/><CP ID="93" FP="X" P="5" N="responseDate"/><CP ID="153" FP="X" P="6" N="messageText"/><CP ID="155" FP="X" P="7" N="messageCode"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="21" T="Crosswalk"><Ps C="S"><P N="name">IB_837_Repricer_ClaimSourceLookup</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="84" FP="VAL" P="0" N="SenderID_Input"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="473" FP="RES" P="0" N="SenderID_Output"/><CP ID="83" FP="CPL" N="completion"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="22" T="ChangeVariable"><Ps C="S"><P N="variableID">2</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="85" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="24" T="ConvertDateTime"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{f1822352-811a-49d3-8b4a-bfa2f07bc8ab}">Converting the date CCYYMMDD to YYYYMMDD.

ec_DataHelper.GetValueByName(&quot;value1&quot;);
var Claim_Billed_Amount    = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByName(&quot;value2&quot;);
var Bill_Type              = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByName(&quot;value3&quot;);
var Claim_Frequency_Code   = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByName(&quot;value4&quot;);
var Assignment_Acceptance  = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByName(&quot;value5&quot;);
var Assignment_Of_Benefits = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByName(&quot;value6&quot;);
var Information_Release    = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByName(&quot;value7&quot;);
var Relationship_To_Sub    = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Relationship_To_Sub&quot;);
if(Relationship_To_Sub == 18 )
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,Patient_Control_Number);

ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2,Bill_Type);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(3,Claim_Frequency_Code);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(4,Assignment_Acceptance);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(5,Assignment_Of_Benefits);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(6,Information_Release);
}
else
{

ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(11,Assignment_Acceptance);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(12,Assignment_Of_Benefits);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(13,Information_Release);

{

{

var end_date               = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(1);
var Relationship_To_Sub    = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Relationship_To_Sub&quot;);
if(Relationship_To_Sub == &quot;18&quot; )
{
if( end_date != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,&quot;472&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,&quot;RD8&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2,start_date  + &quot;-&quot; + end_date);
}
else
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,&quot;472&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,&quot;D8&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2,start_date);
}
}
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="7537" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="7538" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="7534" FP="X" P="0" N="DTP01"/><CP ID="7535" FP="X" P="1" N="DTP02"/><CP ID="7536" FP="X" P="2" N="DTP03"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="462" N="2410_2000B_Drug_Identification" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var Relationship_To_Sub    = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Relationship_To_Sub&quot;);
var resArr1 = new Array(10); // Initialize resArr1 with a specific size
for (var i = 0; i &lt; 3; i++) {
resArr1[i] = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i);
}
if(Relationship_To_Sub == &quot;18&quot; )
{
for (var i = 0; i &lt; 3; i++) {
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,&quot;N4&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(i+1, resArr1[i].replace(/\-/g, ''));
//ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(i, resArr1[i].replace(/\-/g, ''));
}
}</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="7553" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="7554" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="7555" FP="A" P="2" N="value3"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="7549" FP="X" P="0" N="LIN_02"/><CP ID="7550" FP="X" P="1" N="LIN_03"/><CP ID="7551" FP="X" P="2" N="CTP_04"/><CP ID="7552" FP="X" P="3" N="CTP_C001_01"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="464" N="JavaScript_1000A_Submitter_Name" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,&quot;41&quot;);

ID="541" N="Value_Information_Segment_Insert" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">// Retrieving the record set or creating the recordset
myRS1 = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;Value_Information_Segment_2300&quot;);
// Creating an empty array and Getting the value by index and assigning it to the array.
resArr1 = new Array();
for(i=0;i&lt;24;i++)
{
resArr1[i] = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i);
}
//Updating the newly inserted row with the values from the array
myRS1.insertRow();
myRS1.updateRow(resArr1);
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;Value_Information_Segment_2300&quot;, myRS1, true);
//ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,&quot;Claim_Info_input5_2000C&quot;);</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="8279" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="8280" FP="A" P="1" N="variableID">17</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="8342" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="550" N="2300_2000C_DTP" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var CLAIM_DOS_BEGIN_DATE     = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;CLAIM_DOS_BEGIN_DATE&quot;);
var CLAIM_DOS_END_DATE       = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;CLAIM_DOS_END_DATE&quot;);
var Relationship_To_Sub      = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Relationship_To_Sub&quot;);
var DISCHARGE_TIME_HH        = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;DISCHARGE_TIME_HH&quot;);
var ADMITTING_DIAGNOSIS      = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;ADMITTING_DIAGNOSIS&quot;);
var DISCHARGE_TIME_MM       = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;DISCHARGE_TIME_MM&quot;);
if(Relationship_To_Sub != &quot;18&quot; )
{
if(DISCHARGE_TIME_HH + DISCHARGE_TIME_MM != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,&quot;096&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,&quot;TM&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2,DISCHARGE_TIME_HH + DISCHARGE_TIME_MM);
}
if(CLAIM_DOS_BEGIN_DATE + CLAIM_DOS_END_DATE != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(3,&quot;434&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(4,&quot;RD8&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(5,CLAIM_DOS_BEGIN_DATE + &quot;-&quot; + CLAIM_DOS_END_DATE);
}
if(ADMITTING_DIAGNOSIS != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(6,&quot;ABJ&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(7,ADMITTING_DIAGNOSIS);
}
}</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="8349" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="8347" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="8348" FP="X" P="0" N="DTP01"/><CP ID="8350" FP="X" P="1" N="DTP02"/><CP ID="8351" FP="X" P="2" N="DTP03"/><CP ID="8352" FP="X" P="3" N="DTP_01"/><CP ID="8353" FP="X" P="4" N="DTP_02"/><CP ID="8354" FP="X" P="5" N="DTP_03"/><CP ID="8355" FP="X" P="6" N="result7"/><CP ID="8356" FP="X" P="7" N="result8"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="551" T="ChangeVariable"><Ps C="S"><P N="variableID">18</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="8357" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="553" T="ChangeVariable"><Ps C="S"><P N="variableID">19</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="8359" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="554" N="2300_2000C_Admission" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">
var ADMIT_DATE             = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;ADMIT_DATE&quot;);
var ADMIT_TIME_HH          = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;ADMIT_TIME_HH&quot;);
var ADMIT_TIME_MM          = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;ADMIT_TIME_MM&quot;);
var Relationship_To_Sub    = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Relationship_To_Sub&quot;);
var DATE                   =  ADMIT_DATE +  ADMIT_TIME_HH +   ADMIT_TIME_MM
if(Relationship_To_Sub != &quot;18&quot; )
{
if(DATE != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,&quot;435&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,&quot;DT&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2,DATE);
}
}</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="8366" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="8362" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="8363" FP="X" P="0" N="DTP_01"/><CP ID="8364" FP="X" P="1" N="DTP_02"/><CP ID="8365" FP="X" P="2" N="DTP_03"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="555" N="Institutional_Claim_trigger_2000C" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">
// Retrieving the record set or creating the recordset
myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;ServicLine_2000B&quot;);
var Relationship_To_Sub    = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Relationship_To_Sub&quot;);
Fields = myRS.getFields();
for(var i = 0; i &lt; 3; i++)// Report the value of the field at index i
{
if(Relationship_To_Sub != &quot;18&quot; )
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(i,Fields[i]);
}
}</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="8372" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="8367" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="8368" FP="X" P="0" N="CL1_01"/><CP ID="8369" FP="X" P="1" N="CL1_02"/><CP ID="8370" FP="X" P="2" N="CL1_03"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="556" N="Payer_claim_Control_2300_2000C" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var CLAIM_ID_ORIG          = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;CLAIM_ID_ORIG&quot;);
var Relationship_To_Sub    = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Relationship_To_Sub&quot;);
var Claim_Frequency        = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Claim_Frequency&quot;);
if(Claim_Frequency == &quot;7&quot; || Claim_Frequency == &quot;8&quot;)
{
if(Relationship_To_Sub != &quot;18&quot; )
{
if(CLAIM_ID_ORIG != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,&quot;F8&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,CLAIM_ID_ORIG);
}
}
}</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="8376" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="8373" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="8374" FP="X" P="0" N="REF_01"/><CP ID="8375" FP="X" P="1" N="REF_02"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="557" N="Claim_Identifier_2000C" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var CLAIM_ID          = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;CLAIM_ID&quot;);
var Relationship_To_Sub    = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Relationship_To_Sub&quot;);
if(Relationship_To_Sub != &quot;18&quot; )
{
if(CLAIM_ID != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,&quot;D9&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,CLAIM_ID);
}
}</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="8380" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="8377" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="8378" FP="X" P="0" N="REF_01"/><CP ID="8379" FP="X" P="1" N="REF_02"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="558" N="Medical_Record_2000C" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var MED_REC_NO          = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;MED_REC_NO&quot;);
var Relationship_To_Sub    = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Relationship_To_Sub&quot;);
if(Relationship_To_Sub != &quot;18&quot; )
{
if(MED_REC_NO != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,&quot;EA&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,MED_REC_NO);
}
}</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="8384" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="8381" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="8382" FP="X" P="0" N="REF_01"/><CP ID="8383" FP="X" P="1" N="REF_02"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="560" N="Principal_Diagnosis_2000C" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var PRINCIPAL_DIAGNOSIS_CODE          = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;PRINCIPAL_DIAGNOSIS_CODE&quot;);
var PRINCIPAL_DIAGNOSIS_POA          = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;PRINCIPAL_DIAGNOSIS_POA&quot;);
var Relationship_To_Sub    = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Relationship_To_Sub&quot;);
if(Relationship_To_Sub != &quot;18&quot; )
{
if(PRINCIPAL_DIAGNOSIS_CODE != &quot;&quot;)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,&quot;ABK&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1, (PRINCIPAL_DIAGNOSIS_CODE).replace(/\./g,''));
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2,PRINCIPAL_DIAGNOSIS_POA);
}</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="8394" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="8390" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="8391" FP="X" P="0" N="HI01_01"/><CP ID="8392" FP="X" P="1" N="HI01_02"/><CP ID="8393" FP="X" P="2" N="HI01_03"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="561" N="2300_2000C_Admitting_Diagnosis" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var ADMITTING_DIAGNOSIS          = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;ADMITTING_DIAGNOSIS&quot;);
var Relationship_To_Sub    = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Relationship_To_Sub&quot;);
if(Relationship_To_Sub != &quot;18&quot; )
{
if(ADMITTING_DIAGNOSIS != &quot;&quot;)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,&quot;ABJ&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,(ADMITTING_DIAGNOSIS).replace(/\./g,''));
}</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="8398" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="8395" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="8396" FP="X" P="0" N="HI_C022_01"/><CP ID="8397" FP="X" P="1" N="HI_C022_02"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="562" N="Patient_Reason_Trigger_2000C" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">// Retrieving the record set or creating the recordset
myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;Patient_Reason_For_Visit&quot;);
var Relationship_To_Sub    = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Relationship_To_Sub&quot;);
Fields = myRS.getFields();
if(Relationship_To_Sub != &quot;18&quot; )
{
for(var i = 0; i &lt; 3; i++)// Report the value of the field at index i
{
if(Fields[i] != &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; Fields[i] != undefined)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2*i,&quot;APR&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex((2*i)+1,(Fields[i]).replace(/\./g,''));
}
}
}</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="8406" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="8399" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="8400" FP="X" P="0" N="HI01_01"/><CP ID="8401" FP="X" P="1" N="HI01_02"/><CP ID="8402" FP="X" P="2" N="HI02_01"/><CP ID="8403" FP="X" P="3" N="HI02_02"/><CP ID="8404" FP="X" P="4" N="HI03_01"/><CP ID="8405" FP="X" P="5" N="HI03_02"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="563" N="JavaScript_External_Cause_Of_Injury_Trigger_2000C" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">// Retrieving the record set or creating the recordset
myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;DTP_2000B&quot;);
var Relationship_To_Sub    = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Relationship_To_Sub&quot;);
Fields = myRS.getFields();
if(Relationship_To_Sub != &quot;18&quot; )
{
for (var i = 0; i &lt; 12; i++)
{
if(Fields[(2 * i)] !=&quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; Fields[(2 * i)] != undefined )
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex((3 * i), &quot;ABN&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex((3 * i) + 1, (Fields[(2 * i)]).replace(/\./g,''));
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(((3 * i) + 2), Fields[(2 * i )+ 1]);
}
//ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex((3 * i) + 1, Fields[(2 * i)]);
//ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(((3 * i) + 2), Fields[(2 * i )+ 1]);
}
}</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="8409" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="8407" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="8408" FP="X" P="0" N="HI01_01"/><CP ID="8410" FP="X" P="1" N="HI01_02"/><CP ID="8411" FP="X" P="2" N="HI01_09"/><CP ID="8412" FP="X" P="3" N="HI02_01"/><CP ID="8413" FP="X" P="4" N="HI02_02"/><CP ID="8414" FP="X" P="5" N="HI02_09"/><CP ID="8415" FP="X" P="6" N="HI03_01"/><CP ID="8416" FP="X" P="7" N="HI03_02"/><CP ID="8417" FP="X" P="8" N="HI03_09"/><CP ID="8418" FP="X" P="9" N="HI04_01"/><CP ID="8419" FP="X" P="10" N="HI04_02"/><CP ID="8420" FP="X" P="11" N="HI04_09"/><CP ID="8421" FP="X" P="12" N="HI05_01"/><CP ID="8422" FP="X" P="13" N="HI05_02"/><CP ID="8423" FP="X" P="14" N="HI05_09"/><CP ID="8424" FP="X" P="15" N="HI06_01"/><CP ID="8425" FP="X" P="16" N="HI06_02"/><CP ID="8426" FP="X" P="17" N="HI06_09"/><CP ID="8427" FP="X" P="18" N="HI07_01"/><CP ID="8428" FP="X" P="19" N="HI07_02"/><CP ID="8429" FP="X" P="20" N="HI07_09"/><CP ID="8430" FP="X" P="21" N="HI08_01"/><CP ID="8431" FP="X" P="22" N="HI08_02"/><CP ID="8432" FP="X" P="23" N="HI08_09"/><CP ID="8433" FP="X" P="24" N="HI09_01"/><CP ID="8434" FP="X" P="25" N="HI09_02"/><CP ID="8435" FP="X" P="26" N="HI09_09"/><CP ID="8436" FP="X" P="27" N="HI10_01"/><CP ID="8437" FP="X" P="28" N="HI10_02"/><CP ID="8438" FP="X" P="29" N="HI10_09"/><CP ID="8439" FP="X" P="30" N="HI11_01"/><CP ID="8440" FP="X" P="31" N="HI11_02"/><CP ID="8441" FP="X" P="32" N="HI11_09"/><CP ID="8442" FP="X" P="33" N="HI12_01"/><CP ID="8443" FP="X" P="34" N="HI12_02"/><CP ID="8444" FP="X" P="35" N="HI12_09"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="564" N="Other_Diagnosis_Information_Trigger_2000C" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">// Retrieving the record set or creating the recordset
myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;Other_Diagnosis_Information&quot;);
var Relationship_To_Sub    = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Relationship_To_Sub&quot;);
myRS.last();
Fields = myRS.getFields();
if(Relationship_To_Sub != &quot;18&quot; )
{
for (var i = 0; i &lt; 12; i++)
{
if(Fields[(2 * i)] !=&quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; Fields[(2 * i)] != undefined )
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex((3 * i), &quot;ABF&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex((3 * i) + 1, (Fields[(2 * i)]).replace(/\./g,''));
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(((3 * i) + 2), Fields[(2 * i )+ 1]);
}

//ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(((3 * i) + 2), Fields[(2 * i )+ 1]);

}
}

var CLAIM_DOS_END_DATE      = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;CLAIM_DOS_END_DATE&quot;);
var Relationship_To_Sub     = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Relationship_To_Sub&quot;);
var DISCHARGE_TIME_HH       = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;DISCHARGE_TIME_HH&quot;);
var ADMITTING_DIAGNOSIS     = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;ADMITTING_DIAGNOSIS&quot;);
var DISCHARGE_TIME_MM       = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;DISCHARGE_TIME_MM&quot;);
if(Relationship_To_Sub == &quot;18&quot; )
{
if(DISCHARGE_TIME_HH + DISCHARGE_TIME_MM != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,&quot;096&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,&quot;TM&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2,DISCHARGE_TIME_HH + DISCHARGE_TIME_MM);
}
if(CLAIM_DOS_BEGIN_DATE + CLAIM_DOS_END_DATE != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(3,&quot;434&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(4,&quot;RD8&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(5,CLAIM_DOS_BEGIN_DATE + &quot;-&quot; + CLAIM_DOS_END_DATE);
}
if(ADMITTING_DIAGNOSIS != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(6,&quot;ABJ&quot;);

var Relationship_To_Sub    = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Relationship_To_Sub&quot;);
var DATE                   =  ADMIT_DATE +  ADMIT_TIME_HH +  ADMIT_TIME_MM  ;
if(Relationship_To_Sub == &quot;18&quot; )
{
if(DATE != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,&quot;435&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,&quot;DT&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2,DATE);
}
}</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="9243" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="9244" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="9240" FP="X" P="0" N="DTP_01"/><CP ID="9241" FP="X" P="1" N="DTP_02"/><CP ID="9242" FP="X" P="2" N="DTP_03"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="589" N="Institutional_Claim_trigger_2000B" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">// Retrieving the record set or creating the recordset

{

{

}
